category: Volatility breakout with custom DayVolatility function
summary: DVNormal -- TX intraday volatility breakout using custom DayVolatility function. Calculates cumulative open-close gaps over N days, splits into bullish (HCO) and bearish (LCO) components. Entry: when DayVolatility/len exceeds filter(1.9x) of avg bar range (75*len bars), price above/below AM open. Exit: trailing stop at midpoint of AM open + yesterday low/high when highest/lowest bar is in first half of trade. EOD exit at 13:35. Key insight: directional volatility decomposition -- separates gap energy into up/down components for directional bias.

category: CDP-based with MA filter and KD regime detection
summary: T90_Normal_CDP -- TX 4K intraday CDP strategy with MA overlay. Computes CDP pivot (cdp/ah/nh/nl/al). Entry: MA>nh = bullish regime (buy at max(close,open)); MA<nl = bearish (sell at min(close,open)). Reversal entries when price extends 2x daily range beyond CDP. Mean-reversion entries when MA between levels but price dips below nl or spikes above nh with CountIf confirmation. Stop loss at STP(2%), trailing profit target, and 7-bar regime change exit using avg CDP. Walk-forward params shift STP/len/in across periods. Key insight: CDP levels + MA creates regime filter; reversal entries at 2x extensions are contrarian mean-reversion within trend context.

category: CDP strong-trend variant with turbo mode and multi-entry
summary: T90_STRONG -- Aggressive CDP variant with TURBO mode. Same CDP framework as Normal but adds mid-range entries when MA is between CDP and nh/nl (TURBO ON -- entries at MA level with gap confirmation). Extra mean-reversion entries (SH/BL) when price stays between nh-ah or nl-al for 3 bars, with reversal triggers after 5 bars. Hold-exit: if >50% of bars since entry are losing and bars>10, tighten stop to 50% of STP(4.2%). MAMid = 125-bar avg CDP for regime exit. Key insight: turbo mode exploits mid-range opportunities the Normal version skips; wider STP(4.2% vs 2%) enables longer holds in strong trends.

category: CDP with delayed open integration and Fibonacci exits
summary: T89_CriticalOpenXDP -- TX 3K CDP strategy using delayed open price (calctime in-bars after session start) blended into CDP calculation. CDP uses (H1+L1+C1+OPENIN)*0.25 -- incorporating intraday open after in bars for more informed pivot. Entry: OPENIN>cdp = bullish bias; breakout/reversal entries with ratio(1.6x) daily range threshold. Fibonacci exit: C crosses below ah+(ah-nh)*(1-0.618). NOLOSE exit: if >ratio/2 bars are profitable, lock profit at entry+avggap*ratio. Midpoint exit at (high+low)*0.5 after half session. Key insight: delayed open integration makes CDP more adaptive; Fibonacci-based trailing is unique among CDP variants.

category: Bayesian conditional probability with wait/confidence states
summary: BayesLaw_7K_LT -- Concept from Bayes Law. Multi-day hold strategy with state machine. States: wait(0/1) based on 3 consecutive losing position bars; winL/winS tracks if last same-direction trade won. Skips first 2 days and settlement day. Entry conditions: higher lows + close above (prev_close+2*prev_high)/3 for long; CountIf on consecutive HH/HL bars. 3-tier difficulty: standard (2/4 bars confirming), hard (previous winner, 2/3 confirming), very hard (wait=1, 3/3 confirming + gap). Stop: 0.618 * max(daily_range, CDP_range), widening by ED (entry-days) factor. Protect profit when win_pts > stp*1.618 or ed>3. Key insight: Bayesian updating -- prior trade outcome (win/loss) + market state (wait) determines entry strictness. Truly adaptive conditional probability framework.

category: Resilience-based trend following with weekly confirmation
summary: Kings_men_11K_LT -- Fighting with resilience (from Kings Men movie). Multi-day hold with weekly confirmation. Entry conditions: standard = C+open > prev_high+prev_close AND daily low > prev_low; hard (wait=1) adds weekly confirmation (prev week close+open > 2*two-days-ago close AND weekly low > prev weekly low). Stop: asymmetric STP_L/STP_S calculated from (entry - midpoint of prev close+low/high). Widens by ED factor for multi-day holds. Reversal exit: if price reverses to entry level and opposite condition fires. Protecting position: after ed>=2, when price retreats to (entry*2+EntryH)/3, exit at lowd-min(ED, avgHL). Gap filter at session end. Key insight: weekly+daily dual-timeframe confirmation for resilience; asymmetric stops based on distance-to-support/resistance.

category: Post-big-move continuation (Acting Again After)
summary: AAA_13K_LT -- After big trend, Acting Again. Requires prior large move: highest-lowest over 4*ky bars > R(3.4)*0.005*open. Then checks momentum: close moved > R*0.005*open*0.5 over 2*ky bars in trend direction. Plus daily bias: open+close > prev_close+prev_high for long. Stop: half of 4*ky-bar range, widens by ED factor. Protect position after ed>=2 when price in profit but retreating. Key insight: continuation-after-volatility-expansion -- waits for big move to establish, then rides the follow-through. R parameter controls required prior volatility magnitude.

category: MA slope trend following with LinearRegAngle filter
summary: MS_Avg_MA -- TX 10-min MA trend follower using avgp=(O+H+L+C)/4 with 105-bar average. Entry: 3 consecutive rising/falling MA bars + LinearRegAngle of avgp since entry confirms direction. Entry at max(highD(0), highD(1)) for breakout. Exit: trailing profit at EntryH - win_pts*0.1; stop at entry +/- slp(0.1*open) loosening by bars-since-entry; regime exit when k>klen(90) and angle reverses. Avoids settlement Thursday and last trade day. Key insight: avgp smoothing reduces noise; LinearRegAngle since entry validates trade trajectory; stop loosens over time (barssinceentry adjustment) -- time = friend for winners.

category: Opening range breakout with K-power momentum and candle pattern exit
summary: MS_DT_ORB -- TX 8-min day-trade ORB with cumulative K-power (sum of close-open per bar). Entry L1: kpwr>0 + daily low/open avg above prev close = breakout at highD. Entry L3: gap-up (close1-open0 > daily range) = breakout at HighD. Candle pattern exit: 3 consecutive bars where upper shadow > be(3.4x) lower shadow AND range>10pts = exhaustion signal. Stop at entry +/- rstl(1.1%)*open. EOD exit 13:42. Key insight: K-power as cumulative intraday momentum indicator; candle body-shadow ratio for exhaustion detection is sophisticated pattern recognition.

category: EMA trend following with K-power momentum across day/night sessions
summary: MS_EMA -- TX 6-min XAverage(205) trend follower spanning day+night sessions. Entry: NN(3) consecutive rising/falling EMA + 3 consecutive higher/lower closes + cumulative kpwr exceeds gap(65) threshold. After 2017/05: market orders (more aggressive). Exit: EMA slope reverses AND kpwr crosses zero with barssinceentry loosening; rate-based stop at 1.2%*open; short-term kpwr10 (6-bar) exceeds gap = momentum reversal. Key insight: dual kpwr (full-session + short-term) provides multi-timeframe momentum; night session trading post-2017 reform.

category: CDP pivot with ada (all-day-adjusted) OHLC for night session support
summary: MS_FDT_CDP -- TX 9-min CDP using ada (all-day-adjusted) OHLC functions for accurate day+night session pivots. CDP calculated from Highada/Lowada/Closeada(1). Entry B1: close > (ah+nh)/2 above openada (first entry); B2: close > ah (re-entry at Highada breakout). Candle exhaustion exit: 3 bars with shadow ratio > be(2.2) and range >10pts. Profit limit at entry*(1+/-slr(0.2%)). Time exit adjusted for pre/post 2017 night session reform. Key insight: ada functions solve the TAIFEX night-session OHLC problem -- standard HighD/LowD break across sessions, ada provides continuous daily aggregation.

category: Inside bar (mother-son candle) breakout
summary: MS_LT_Mother_Son -- Inside bar breakout. Identifies mother-son pattern: highD(2)>=highD(1) AND lowD(2)<=lowD(1) (day2 engulfs day1 = day1 is inside bar). Sets uband/dband at inside bars high/low. Tracks hh/ll since pattern formation. Entry: close > uband AND bullish candle = buy at hh (highest since pattern). Exit: next day makes lower high AND lower low = trend reversal; rate stop at rSLP(1.7%)*open. Avoids settlement Thursday and last trade day. Key insight: clean inside-bar implementation; cnt counter tracks time since pattern -- longer consolidation = stronger breakout.

category: Weekly range breakout (Thursday-to-Wednesday cycle)
summary: MS_LT_WD4_WD3 -- Weekly range breakout on Thursday-to-Wednesday cycle. Resets weekly high/low on Thursday open; accumulates through Wednesday. Entry: 2 consecutive closes >= prior weekly high = breakout buy at max(dhh, highD) stop. Stop: fixed slp(85) pts; weekly reversal exit on Wednesday if new week fails to exceed old weeks range. Profit take: win_pts > (whh-wll)*be(0.8) with trailing at EntryH - win_pts/4. Key insight: non-standard weekly cycle (Thu-Wed instead of Mon-Fri) aligns with TAIFEX settlement calendar; dhh/dll track intra-cycle developing highs/lows for precision entry.

category: Weekly range breakout (Friday-to-Monday cycle)
summary: MS_WD1_WD5 -- Weekly range breakout on Friday-to-Monday cycle. Resets on Friday close or Monday open. Entry: 2 closes > prior weekly high AND close > prev close AND close-whh < (whh-wll)*be(0.71) -- breakout not too extended. Stop: rslp(7%)*open (wide for weekly holds); Friday reversal check; no-trend exit if >50% of bars since entry are below whh. Profit trailing at EntryH - win_pts/4; stop at min(entry-slp, whh-slp). Key insight: 7% stop is extremely wide for weekly system -- true swing trading; be(0.71) filter ensures entry near breakout, not at extended levels.

category: Fibonacci 1.382 extension breakout with 5 entry scenarios
summary: S_010_3G -- TX intraday Fibonacci 1.382 extension. Calculates up=HL*1.382+Low, dn=High-HL*1.382, mid=(H+L)*0.5 from prior day. 5 entry scenarios: L1=open>up+bullish bar; L2=open between mid-up, high>up; L3=open<=mid but high>up (stretch breakout); L4=open<dn but first bar bullish, high>dn (reversal); L5=consolidation between dn-mid with low>mid (support hold). First half of day only (midK). EOD time exit. Key insight: systematic coverage of all open-relative-to-Fibonacci scenarios -- each entry type captures different market open behavior relative to 1.382 extensions.

category: PercentRank extremes with avg point movement breakout
summary: S_047_Trender -- 7-min intraday trend follower. Uses PercentRank: if low from len-1 bars ago is in bottom 10th percentile of last len(8) lows AND today high breaks above that low + perKPnt*num(9) average bar moves = trend confirmed. Entry at today high (highada). Stop level set at the extreme bar price. Fixed stl(185) point stop loss. EOD exit. Key insight: PercentRank identifies extreme lows/highs as launchpads; num*perKPnt threshold ensures sufficient escape velocity from the extreme -- combines statistical extreme detection with momentum confirmation.

category: Gap opening with average daily range stop
summary: S_072_OpenerV3 -- 15-min gap-open swing strategy. Entry: open > prev day high (gap-up) = buy at today high stop; open < prev day low (gap-down) = sell at today low. Uses array of last 20 days daily ranges with rolling average (dist.avg) for adaptive stop: stl=dist.avg*ratio(1.5). Bad-K exit: if close breaks below min(prev_low, open-dist.avg). Overbought exit: if win_pts > 2*stl and daily range exceeds dist.avg. Stop loosens by dist.avg/3 per holding day (k.day). Avoids settlement days +/-1 day. Key insight: array-based rolling daily range is more robust than simple ATR; stop loosening per day held acknowledges trend persistence.

category: Grid trading system for stocks/ETFs with position scaling
summary: SpyGrid -- Grid trading system for TAISE stocks. Sets grid levels at +pSPersen(5.1%)/-pBPersen(5%) from reference price. Initial buy of pGrid(10) contracts, then buys at lower grid / sells at upper grid. Tracks net PnL, MDD, minimum capital required. Position cap at 2x grid size. UpMove mode: ratchets grid upward when price exceeds upper band. Uses TAISE tick-size functions for proper price rounding. Displays real-time stats: price/MP/amt/netprofit/MDD/return%. Key insight: proper implementation of grid trading with TAISE-specific tick sizes; capital efficiency metrics (Net/Amt/Cnt) enable comparison across instruments.

category: 3-day average high/low breakout
summary: TX_20210219_LO -- Swing strategy using 3-day average highs/lows. hh=avg(highD(1-3)), ll=avg(lowD(1-3)). Entry: high > hh AND open > prev low = buy at (highD+open)/2 stop; low < ll AND open < prev high = sell at (lowD+open)/2 stop. After in(54-69) bars delay. Trailing stop at EntryH/L +/- (hh-ll). Gap reversal exit: if open gaps against position. Walk-forward shifts in parameter. Key insight: 3-day averaged levels smooth out single-day noise; entry at midpoint of today extreme + open is compromise between aggressive and conservative entry.

category: CDP + SlowK stochastic with dynamic box range
summary: CDPKD_D0 -- TX 5K intraday CDP + KD oscillator. Builds dynamic hbox/lbox from first in-3 bars nh/nl levels. Entry: bar counter > in AND close breaks out of hbox/lbox AND close vs midpoint AND SlowDCustom(9) > kd_val(74-78) for long / < (100-kd_val) for short AND open gap confirmation. Stop: stp(60) pts, reduces to 50% when bar > 30 AND highest losing bar exceeds 50% of barssinceentry -- dynamic stop tightening when trade goes nowhere. EOD exit 13:25. Walk-forward shifts in/kd_val. Key insight: CDP range as initial box + KD overbought/oversold filter; stop halving when position is stuck is practical money management.

category: Three consecutive same-direction candle momentum with MA filter
summary: 3Red_LO -- 45-min 3-candle momentum strategy. Entry: 3 ascending opens (o>o[1]>o[2]) + 2 higher closes + close>MA(n2=59-71) + net candle body power between n1(11-19) and 10*n1 (not too strong/weak) + no single bar > n2 pts (avoid spike bars). Volatility filter: 3-bar max body span < stp(130-170). Bad-entry detection: if bar after entry strongly reverses (body > prev body, breaks prev close, and crosses MA) = set bad_entry flag for immediate exit. Multi-exit: 3*n1 bar timeout if losing; lowest(len) trailing; 4*n1 adverse move; 3*stp profit take; 3 consecutive counter-candles. Key insight: bad-entry pattern recognition is sophisticated -- detects when entry bar was a false signal immediately, cutting losses before stop hit.

category: Candle body ratio (K-Power) momentum with trailing stop
summary: KPOWER_DO -- TX 10K intraday K-power (candle body ratio). Entry: CountIf (c-l)/(h-l) > 0.5 over len(8) bars >= 5 (majority of bars close in upper half) + daily bias (avg of low+open > prev close) + current bar bullish. Entry at highest(h, len3=5) stop. Trailing stop at movingstl(200) pts from position high/low. Profit target at entry+300 limit. EOD settlement exit. Key insight: (c-l)/(h-l) ratio as K-power -- measures closing position within bar range; statistical counting (5/8 bars) provides robust momentum detection vs single-bar patterns.

category: MACD histogram momentum with monthly loss limit and wrong-position exit
summary: MACD_LO -- TX hourly MACD histogram momentum with risk management. MACD(12,26,9). Counts consecutive bars of rising/falling histogram (buycount/sellcount). Entry: count >= EnterCount(9) + 3 higher lows/lower highs. Exit: count > OutCount(9) in opposite direction + close/open reversal. Monthly loss limiter: tracks cumulative monthly PnL, stops trading when monthly loss or MDD exceeds monthlevel(100K). Wrong-position exit: after BarX(8) bars, if >50% of bars have close against entry. N-bar lowest/highest trailing stop at BarN(30). Short profit limit at -7%. Key insight: monthly loss circuit breaker is professional risk management; wrong-position detector uses statistical evidence rather than fixed stop.

category: Pivot Trend with up/down volume accumulation
summary: PT_D0 -- TX intraday Pivot Trend strategy. Tracks cumulative up-volume (when high > prev close, adds h-l[1]) and down-volume (when prev close > low, adds h[1]-l). Entry: abs(up-dn) > previous session swing (sw) AND CountIf(consecutive higher lows or lower highs) >= G(60%) of bars. Entry at highest(h,3) stop. Exit: trailing stop at weighted avg of AM high/low minus max of current/previous daily range. Session 09:00-11:00 only. EOD exit. Key insight: up/dn accumulation is simplified volume-spread analysis -- measures directional pressure without volume data; G parameter sets consistency threshold.

category: Volatility expansion with Williams %R and adaptive trade limiting
summary: Range_R_LO -- TX 19-min volatility expansion strategy. Detects range expansion: near-term avg range > far-term avg range (R_near > R_far). Combines with Williams %R: > 80 for longs, < 20 for shorts. Adaptive trade limiting: if last 3 trades lost, limits to 1 trade/day; otherwise allows 3. Exit on contraction: R_near < R_far + opposite %R signal. Trailing pullback: EntryH/L minus recent close range when R_near > aa(60). Walk-forward stable: len(17-21), aa(45-60). Key insight: volatility cycle (compression->expansion->contraction) as regime framework; adaptive trade frequency based on recent PnL is practical money management.

category: Linear regression crossover with closing price zone filter
summary: Sw_D_5min_Linear -- TX 5-min linear regression strategy. LinearRegValue(16) vs XAverage(LR1, 32) crossover. Entry: N-1/N(12/13) bars of LR1 momentum in one direction + close vs prior day avg+/-range zone filter. Session 08:45-10:00 only, first entry of day. Exit: fixed sl(55-85) pts stop; 250pt profit trailing at lowest(l,2)/highest(h,2); moving profit: when maxprofit > 200 and position retraces > 50%, exit at market. Settlement day awareness with tag variable. Walk-forward: len(12-16), N(11-13), sl(55-85). Key insight: LinearReg vs its own EMA creates a smooth momentum oscillator; 50% retracement of max profit is an effective trailing method.

category: Keltner Channel breakout with flag-based entry tracking
summary: Keltner_LO_2010 -- TX 13-min Keltner Channel (avg + ATR*KAtr(3.8) envelope, KLen=18). Entry: close crosses above upper band = sets Bflag, records HH; buys at HH+1 stop on next bar. Similar for shorts. Stop: fixed STL(90) pts; trailing Gap(180) pts from EntryH/L; band reversal exit (price fully below opposite band). 09:00-13:30 entry window. Key insight: Bflag mechanism decouples signal detection from entry execution -- close crossing band signals intent, but actual entry waits for HH+1 breakout confirmation. 3.8x ATR is very wide = catches only strong breakouts.

category: Multi-scenario breakout with weekly midpoint, gap reversal, and NDayH/L
summary: PBO_LO (HW4) -- Complex multi-scenario breakout. 1) Gap reversal: open gaps above NDayH(3-day high) but closes below it with >80pt retracement = sellshort. 2) Weekly midpoint: close crosses through last week (H+L)/2 = enter with NDayL protection. 3) Standard breakout: 3 bars > NDayH with K-power majority + not gapped + LastWeekMiddleBiasLimit(500). 4) Reverse-on-reversal: if position retraces >RevStopVal(140) or gap-opens against = reverse position with bRevFlag. Middle-entry separate exit regime (stop at max(lastWeekMiddle, NDayL)). Walk-forward: notin(4-12), jump(50-130), RevStopVal(80-140). Key insight: systematic coverage of 4 distinct market scenarios with separate exit regimes per entry type -- each scenario has its own risk profile.

category: Consecutive higher low / lower high with ada OHLC
summary: LLH_6mK_FDO -- TX 6-min consecutive bar pattern using ada functions. Entry: h>h[1] AND l>l[1] AND l>closeada(1) for longs (higher high + higher low + above prev session close). First entry only per day, after in(10) bars. Stop: max(lowada(0), entry-sn(100)). Profit target: entry + (entry-lowada) + sn when H-entry > 2*sn AND lowada distance > sn. PM/night session exit if losing and below close. Time exit before night session end. Key insight: simple but effective -- consecutive HH+HL is strong momentum signal; ada functions handle night session OHLC correctly for TAIFEX.

category: Linear regression angle with dual-timeframe trend detection and circuit breaker
summary: TXA_13mLineReg_LOS_V2 -- TX 13-min linear regression angle strategy. LinearRegValue(45) vs AverageFC(45) for trend; LinearRegAngleFC(6) > p2(58) for entry timing; LinearRegAngleFC(15) for exit timing. BullTrend = LR > LR[1] AND LR > MA AND angle > 58. Exit when angle < threshold and LR < MA. 9% daily limit circuit breaker: if high/low exceeds prev close * 1.09 = force exit (market crash/rally protection). Fixed 150pt stop. Skips first day after settlement. Walk-forward: Len(45), p1(-87), p2(58). Key insight: 3-speed angle system -- fast(6) for entry, medium(15) for exit, slow(45) for trend. 9% circuit breaker is unique risk management for tail events.

Uses CF995.CF.dll for order execution, auto-index management, settlement day detection, drawdown control, and trade list output. Handles session transitions, settlement day logic for TAIFEX/HSI/YM, weight management based on rolling PnL. Core infrastructure for algo trading system.

category: Backup of autoCF framework
summary: Backup copy of @autoCF. Duplicate skipped.

category: Position sizing / leverage calculation utility
summary: LeverageCalculation -- Portfolio position sizing calculator. MaxContract = MaxStrategyNum * TotalValue * DailyLossPct / (ATR * BigPointValue * Swing). Risk parity across 72 strategies via ATR-normalization.

category: Parameterized multi-condition short-selling framework with MAE/MFE adaptive exits
summary: LSEDEV_S_OPT -- Parameterized short-only framework with 28 entry conditions (con_i=1..28): bearish engulfing, new low breakout, MACD crossunder, RSI oversold, pivot highs, MA crossunder, candlestick body analysis, gap patterns. Adaptive SL/TP from rolling MAE/MFE. 22 pre-optimized parameter sets. Meta-strategy: single codebase generates dozens of uncorrelated short strategies.

category: MultiCharts EasyLanguage teaching examples collection
summary: MC1 teaching code -- EasyLanguage examples: syntax, order types, BlackKbar/RedKbar, CDP indicator, MA crossover, RSI, OverMonth, day trading template, Bollinger Band breakout, ATR trend following. Teaching material, not production.

category: Production order execution wrapper with weight management
summary: Order -- Production order wrapper. _IsOrderOutput detects position changes. _MRGOutputTxt writes orders for MR.AutoTrading. _WeightManagement: near(250d)/far(750d) PnL momentum ratio. _TradeListOutput: complete trade journal. Bridge between backtest and live execution.

category: Mean reversion on EMA bias with morning-only window
summary: BiasReverse 3mK DT -- Mean reversion on TX 3-min. Entry: price >1.5% from 300-bar XAverage + reversal candle. Morning only 09:00-09:33. Exit: target=EMA, stop=day extreme, time exit at 10:00. Exploits opening gap overnight bias reversion.

category: Gap coverage reversal with shock volatility detection
summary: TXFM_COVERGAP_D0 -- Gap coverage mean reversion. 4 scenarios: SHOCK(normal gap+consolidation=fade), BSHOCK(big gap=fade), VBSHOCK(>2% gap=ride momentum), NBSHOCK(no gap+consolidation+3-bar momentum=breakout). Gap coverage exit when price crosses prev close. HURT reversal on failed fades.

category: Box breakout with RSI filter and backhand reversal
summary: TX_Box_FDT0_Jack -- 5-min box breakout. HighestFC(h,20) breakout with gap+MA+RSI filter. Backhand reversal on failed breakout within 2 bars. Night re-entry after profit. Percent trailing(30%/120pt), fixed SL(19pt), target(250pt). Monthly drawdown control(75K).

category: Stochastic KD overbought/oversold with daily breakout
summary: TX_KDHL_LT -- 60-min Stochastic swing. SlowK >80 for 3 bars = bullish flag. Entry: SlowK>SlowD + flag, buy at day high. Exit: opposite flag, KD cross trail at 10-bar low, gap-down stop. Key: 3-bar dwell in overbought = momentum confirmation, not exhaustion.

category: Dual-timeframe HL midpoint with time-ratio exit
summary: TX_HLtime_LT -- 20-min dual HL midpoint swing. v1=(H+L)/2 over 15 bars, v2=same over 45. Entry when weighted price > both midpoints. Time-ratio exit: if >85% bars underwater = exit. Key: time-ratio exit elegantly captures wrong-thesis trades regardless of PnL.

category: Price change momentum with cumulative flow indicator
summary: Sing014_TX_Change_LT -- Custom momentum from price change flow. BB = sum(positive change - negative cumulative flow, Len). Entry: BB>0 + price > recent highs. FanSO reversal on immediate failure. Exit trail with time penalty. Key: cumulative flow resets on direction change, capturing fresh momentum.

category: Enhanced Change momentum with daily buy/sell strength
summary: ChangeDabrother_LT -- Enhanced Change_LT adding daily buy/sell strength tracking. Exit stop width adapts: buyer-dominant days = wider stop (0.3x), seller-dominant = tighter (0.15x). Key: adaptive stop based on market microstructure.

category: Weekly range breakout with ATR acceleration filter
summary: Sing_010_TX_W_LT -- Weekly swing. ATR(5)>ATR(10) = volatility expanding. Entry at average of high and previous bullish candle. Exit at weekly low if rising. Key: ATR acceleration captures regime change from consolidation to trending.

category: Keltner Channel breakout with multi-tier trailing
summary: TX_KCForward_L0 -- Keltner Channel breakout 32-min. Close crosses KC upper (MA15+1.5*ATR15) + bullish candle = buy at day high. Exit: fixed 100pt stop, 2x KC lower emergency exit, 2-day trailing low, breakeven lock. Key: KC smoother than Bollinger, ATR-based bands adapt without StdDev sensitivity.

category: Channel breakout with 3-bar momentum and gap detection
summary: TXA_CHANNEL_LO -- 6-min channel breakout. BuyCond: 3 consecutive bullish + new high + close > close[3]+1.7*range. Day: enter at prevClose+HLRange(75% of 64-bar range). Night: enter at refHigh+avgRange. Key: asymmetric buy(3/3) vs sell(2/3) conditions reflects market microstructure.

category: Consecutive candle pattern with range filter
summary: TXA_CO4_DO_5min -- 5-min 4-bar unanimous momentum. Entry: 4 consecutive bullish bars with range>=10 on 3/4 + new high = buy. Exit: session-high reversal on 3 bearish, 200pt profit trail at 80%. Key: 4-bar unanimous momentum is strong short-term signal on TX.

category: Gap + range expansion breakout with directional filter
summary: TXF_JumpRange3K_DT -- 3-min gap-range breakout. Gap(open vs prev close>10) + range expansion(H-O>10*2). Wait 13 bars for price discovery. Entry at prev day high/low. Profit 3.5%, stop 3%. Night trail. Key: combines overnight gap with intraday expansion after 39-min discovery period.

category: Two-day range breakout with action threshold
summary: TX_LongBandForwardTrade_L0 -- 45-min 2-day range breakout. TwoDayHigh/Low = max/min of last 2 days. Entry when range breaks AND total range > 1.9% of close. Fixed SL 230pt. Key: 1.9% threshold filters noise breakouts in low-volatility regimes.

category: 3-day range breakout with ADX filter and pivot reverse
summary: TX_3DAYBRK_LO -- 7-min 3-day breakout. Range(3-day H-L)>80 + ADX(20)>20 = trending+volatile. Buy at 3-day high. Reverse if fails within 15 bars at HLRange/2. Percent trailing 2%/30%. Key: ADX ensures trending regime; 15-bar reverse window captures false breakouts.

category: Dual lookback low confirmation with session-avg filter
summary: TXA_2N_DO_3min -- 3-min dual-N breakout. Lowest(5)>Lowest(10) = ascending lows + 4 consecutive HH + session midpoint > weighted closes + price>low+0.8*range. Fixed 50pt stop, 200pt profit trail at 80%. Key: dual-N confirms ascending structure with momentum.

category: Two-day range breakout with bias and gap-open scenario
summary: TwoDayHighLow_L0 -- Two-day range breakout with bias. Within-range: close breaks 2-day high+85pt = buy. Gap-open above: wait 5+ bars, close>high+45pt = buy at day high stop. Key: two entry regimes -- within-range needs larger confirmation (85pt), gap-open needs less (45pt).

category: Weekly midpoint breakout with adaptive bias
summary: TX_WEEKBRKOUT_LO -- 17-min weekly midpoint breakout. WeekAvg=(H+L)/2. Adaptive: if last 2 trades won, tighter entry (0.4%); losing, wider (0.8%). Asymmetric short(2x). Decaying stop: 1%-barsSinceEntry/3. Profit trail 2.7%/30%. Key: adaptive entry width from recent win rate.

category: RSI crossover with trailing stop from entry extreme
summary: TXF_RSI_60m_FLT -- Simple RSI(40) crossover 60-min. Buy: RSI crosses 50. Short: RSI crosses 30. Trail from entry-high at max(1%,150pt). Key: long RSI(40 bars=40hr) acts as trend filter, not oscillator. Asymmetric short threshold reflects selloff needs more confirmation.

category: RSI cross with forward breakout entry
summary: RSIForwardTrade_L0 -- RSI(7) cross over BuyLine(72) = record day range, set flag. Forward entry: buy at RSIDayHigh stop. Key: RSI as setup signal, not entry -- crossing 72 says prepare, actual entry waits for price proof at day high.

category: Daily contrarian with ATR entry and drawdown control
summary: TX_DayContrarian_LO_300M -- Daily-bar contrarian at ATR-defined extremes. Monthly drawdown control 150K/200K. Key: contrarian on daily timeframe, 300-min bar captures full trading day for cleaner signals.

category: MACD histogram with ADX trend strength filter
summary: TX_MACDADX_L0 -- MACD(12,19) + XAvg signal(34) + ADX(4). MACD histogram cross with ADX confirmation. Fixed SL(140pt). Key: short ADX(4) captures recent trend strength changes. Wide SL WF range (40-140) suggests robustness to stop placement.

category: Forward filled gap with momentum multiplier
summary: TX_17mFFG_LOS -- 17-min forward filled gap. Momentum multiplier: if last 3 trades include loss, mul=1+0.66 (mild martingale). Weekly cycle tracking. Monthly drawdown 150K/200K. Key: mild martingale assumes losses cluster near regime changes, next trade captures new regime.

category: RSI midzone cross with position tracking
summary: RSIRevisedTrading_L0 -- 10-min RSI(8) crosses SellLine(46) upward = buy. Position extreme tracking (MPHigh/MPLow). Fixed SL(110pt), WinPoint(140pt). Key: RSI crossing 46 (midzone) captures bearish-to-neutral momentum transition, not overbought signal.

category: Triple EMA crossover on log-price
summary: SingletoTriAve_L0 -- 30-min triple EMA on Log(Close). SingleAve-TriAverage crosses 0 = entry. WinPoint(130pt) profit trigger. Key: log-price EMA removes price-level dependency; triple smoothing creates stable trend baseline for acceleration detection.

name: CBST017_MAOCHL_9m_FDO
logic: MA trend + daily OHLC comparison. Entry when MA rising and today open > yesterday close + today low > yesterday low (long), or inverse for short.
entry: MA slope + daily price structure alignment; stop entry at daily high/low
exit: Time-out (night 4:30, day 13:40), 8% profit limit, last-trade-day close
notable: Uses custom AM session OHLC functions; limits daily entries to 1; transitions from day-trade to overnight rules after date cutoff

name: CBST020_Aroon_29m_FLO
logic: Aroon indicator breakout. Enters when Aroon Up hits 100 (long) or Aroon Down hits 100 (short) via stop orders.
entry: Aroon extreme (100) with stop entry at H/L; flat only; skip first day of month
exit: Fixed stoploss 170pts; Aroon reversal exit when Aroon_Up<=10 recovering + Osc>=45; last-trade-day close
notable: Clean Aroon-based mean reversion exit; avoids first day of contract month

name: CBST023_HLB_29m_FLO_V3
logic: N-bar high/low breakout with percentage-based stoploss. Enters on break of Highest(H,20)/Lowest(L,20) after 10:00, Mon-Thu only.
entry: Channel breakout at N-bar high/low +1 tick stop
exit: Percentage stoploss; trailing channel exit after 5*Len bars; conditional channel exit if profit small after Len bars
notable: Multi-layered exit depending on profit magnitude and time held

name: CBST027_LNR_29m_FLO_V4
logic: Linear regression value of midprice minus double-MA as trend filter. Enters on LNR slope change combined with MA crossover direction.
entry: LNR rising + short MA < long MA -> buy at Highest(H,4) stop; inverse for short
exit: LNR reversal; percentage stoploss; movable trailing after profit; 50% trailing after 160pts
notable: Novel use of linear regression as detrended oscillator; four-layer exit system

name: DL300M01_V10_DMI
logic: DMI-based counter-trend entry. Buys when DMI+ < DMI- at N-bar high breakout.
entry: Counter-DMI: buy breakout when DMI bearish, sell breakdown when DMI bullish
exit: Fixed stoploss 60pts; last-trade-day close
notable: Counter-intuitive DMI usage. Walk-forward optimized with date-segmented parameters

name: DL300M01_V11_DMI_WF
logic: Walk-forward version of V10 with hardcoded date-period parameters.
entry: Same counter-DMI logic as V10
exit: Same fixed stoploss + settlement exit
notable: WF version with 7 date periods (2015-2021)

name: QC2102_M10_LO
logic: Triple XAverage on midprice with dynamic trailing. Enters when bullish/bearish candle closes above/below all three lagged XAverages for the first time.
entry: Candle pattern + close crosses max of 3 lagged XAverages + new high breaks prior bar; stop entry
exit: Dynamic BOut/SOut levels ratchet with trend; trailing at 1.1%; position reversal on breakdown
notable: Sophisticated adaptive exit system with position reversal capability

name: QC2102_M10_LO_WF
logic: Walk-forward version of QC2102_M10_LO.
entry: Same as QC2102_M10_LO
exit: Same dynamic BOut/SOut + trailing
notable: WF version; Day3 stays fixed at 13 across all periods

name: 030_TX_TriAve_SingleAve_L0
logic: Triple EMA composite vs single EMA crossover. TotalAve = avg of XAverage at Len1/3, 2*Len1/3, Len1. Enters on cross of AverageTrend.
entry: TotalAve cross over/under AverageTrend at daily high/low stop
exit: Fixed stoploss 220pts; no-loss for short side at 180pts; trailing at 2*WinPoint
notable: Asymmetric exit: long side has no no-loss exit, short side does

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/031_3 DAY H&L no mp_FLT.md
name: 031_3DAY_HL_FLT
logic: 3-day average high/low trend following. Enters when 3-day avg high rising and change exceeds ATR(60).
entry: Rising 3-day highs + magnitude > ATR -> buy at market
exit: Conditional stoploss on loss threshold AND momentum reversal
notable: Stoploss only triggers when BOTH loss threshold AND momentum reversal are met

name: 031_TX_AllDay_TriAveSingleAve_L0
logic: AllDay variant of TriAverage strategy with different params (Len1=36, Len2=29).
entry: Same TotalAve cross logic
exit: Fixed stoploss only for short (170pts); long side has no fixed stop
notable: Long side has no fixed stoploss - lets winning longs run much longer

name: 032_TX_VHF_LO_37M
logic: VHF as regime filter. VHF<=0.5 (range-bound) combined with open vs prev close for direction. Adaptive VHF length based on ATR.
entry: VHF<=0.5 + open>prev close -> buy at daily high stop; excludes settlement week
exit: Stoploss 160pts; trailing at 20% then 80% of win_pts
notable: Counter-intuitive: uses low-VHF (consolidation) to trigger breakout trades

name: 033_TX_DayC_LO_300M
logic: Multi-signal: contrarian on large candles (>1.5*ATR), mean-reversion on 3-bar drops, breakout after rest.
entry: 3 entry types: contrarian, mean-reversion, breakout-after-rest
exit: Backhand reversal when losing; tiered trailing 30%/70% at 1x/2x TP; monthly entry limit
notable: Hybrid contrarian entries + trend exits. Monthly trade counter limits overtrading

name: 045_TX_BY_DO
logic: Intraday momentum continuation. Compares avgprice trends over session, enters breakout with adaptive levels based on broader trend context.
entry: Rising highs AND lows + adaptive stop level; time-filtered
exit: Natural stop at session extreme; mean-reversion at prior session midpoint; EOD close
notable: Adaptive entry levels: wider when short-term aligns with longer-term trend, tighter when divergent

name: 047_TX_BBR_DO
logic: Bollinger Band breakout with gap-adjusted prices and bar-position analysis for trend confirmation.
entry: Price below lower band + highest bar after lowest bar -> buy at breakout; max 1/day first 30 bars
exit: Exit when price in upper half but drops below 2.1-sigma; EOD + settlement
notable: Gap-adjustment removes overnight gaps for cleaner intraday analysis. Array-based price tracking

name: 047_TXI_CorrelationTrend_DO
logic: Ehlers Correlation Trend indicator measuring linear regression correlation between price and time.
entry: CorrTrend > 0.65 rising + C > open -> buy at daily high stop; monthly loss circuit breaker
exit: Trailing at daily low + bar adjustment; PM exit if losing; time close; extreme move exit
notable: Ehlers indicator with monthly risk management (80k loss limit, 100k max DD). 4 exit mechanisms

name: 053_TX_NBY_DO
logic: Intraday V-pattern detection with gap-adjusted prices. Identifies V-bottoms where range exceeds daily avg and slope meets threshold.
entry: V-pattern: range > DayAvg*0.9 + slope >= 5.1pts/bar -> adaptive stop
exit: Natural stop at session extreme; 2nd derivative inflection exit; EOD + settlement
notable: Second-derivative exit (d2*d2[1]<0) catches momentum inflection points

name: 059_TXI_CLOSED_LO
logic: Multi-day close trend + weighted MA regime. 3 consecutive daily closes rising/falling + C vs WAverage(162). Gap-adjusted global prices.
entry: 3-day rising closes + C > WAverage -> buy at adaptive level shifted by prior trade result
exit: Profit at avgdis*9.4; pullback trailing after weekly break; extreme 3% exit; fixed stoploss
notable: Adaptive entry levels shift based on prior trade outcome. Gap-detrending via running accumulation

name: 060_Hsiang_TXA_Q5_R_10min_FLT
logic: Pivot-based range + momentum acceleration. Daily pivot (H+L+C)/3 range. Enters on acceleration pattern (H rising at increasing rate).
entry: Price > pivot threshold + H acceleration (2nd order) + 5-bar low rising -> buy at AM high stop
exit: Open gap exit; fixed 200pts stoploss; time-in-trade exit after 130 bars; settlement close
notable: Uses second-order momentum (acceleration of highs) for entry confirmation

name: 064_TXA_HLGAPBC_LO_20min
logic: Daily gap + compression breakout. Enters when daily low gaps above previous lows AND current 25-bar range is contracting.
entry: Low gap + compression + acceleration -> buy at H stop
exit: 2% stoploss; settlement exit
notable: Multi-condition filter: gap + range contraction + acceleration. High selectivity

name: 064_TXI_ORB_LO
logic: Opening Range Breakout on FITXI. Enters after N bars when price near yesterday high/low, using AM session high/low as stop entry.
entry: After 4-bar delay, C < yesterday high -> buy at AM high stop; max 1/day
exit: 8% trailing; stoploss at entry +/- scaled by open; trailing profit lock at 50%; extreme 4% exit
notable: WF with 9 date periods. Multi-day holding tracks days-in-trade

name: 092_VWAP_3k_DT
logic: VWAP-style midline trend following. Midline = (3H+3L+avgprice)/7. Tracks bars above/below midline for trend confirmation.
entry: After 16 bars, bullish trend + 3 bars above midline + open > avgD -> buy at 5-bar high stop; burst entry on 3x ATR
exit: Dynamic stoploss at session extreme +/- avg range; noon exit if stagnant; reversal on opposite count
notable: Burst-in mechanism for sudden momentum. Reversal logic as implicit regime switch

name: 09042_Qindicator_13min_LT
logic: Custom Q-indicator: normalized 3-bar momentum accumulation. Q = 5*Mean/StdDev. Enters when Q crosses threshold with candle confirmation.
entry: Q >= 2.9 + bullish candle + Q > Q[2] -> buy at 3-bar high stop; avoids settlement week
exit: Multi-day structure break; reversal when Q flips + loss > ATR*ratio; conditional trailing
notable: Novel custom standardized momentum indicator. Tracks entry-days held. Walk-forward 6 periods

name: 0327_FINI_Trend
logic: TWSE FINI 3-bar consecutive trend following on TXF.
entry: FINI 3 consecutive rises -> buy TXF at market
exit: 1.25% stoploss; settlement close
notable: Homework strategy. Cross-market correlation trade using financial sector index

name: 0403_WT_MultiSignal
logic: Multi-timeframe multi-data strategy with Bollinger Bands and spread analysis.
entry: Multiple conditions involving spread, BB position, trend confirmation
exit: Multiple stoploss/profit mechanisms
notable: Complex homework with 20+ params combining futures-spot spread with technicals

name: 0528_BBand_1h
logic: Bollinger Band strategy on 1h TXF with TWSE hourly filter.
entry: BB + cross-market filter entries
exit: Separate long/short SL and profit targets
notable: Homework strategy with asymmetric long/short parameters

name: 0530_ATRChannel_60m
logic: ATR channel breakout with FINI volume filter. Channel = SMA(80) +/- 2*ATR(45).
entry: FINI > 3000 + channel up -> buy at upper band; FINI < -1000 + down -> sell at lower band
exit: Mean-reversion at SMA center; 2% stoploss
notable: Asymmetric FINI thresholds (3000 long vs -1000 short)

name: 0629_FINI_3bar_Daily
logic: Same FINI 3-bar trend as 0327 with additional ORB/spread parameters.
entry: FINI 3 consecutive rises/falls -> buy/sell TXF
exit: 1.25% stoploss; settlement close
notable: Extended homework version of 0327

name: 0704_UV_DV_Spread_5min
logic: Up-volume vs down-volume spread + futures-spot spread. 5 data streams.
entry: Neg spread + UV-DV cross 750 -> buy; Pos spread + UV-DV cross -500 -> sell; 09:00-13:30
exit: Percentage stoploss and profit targets
notable: Volume decomposition with cross-market spread filter. Multi-data requiring 6 streams

entry_logic: Triangle IN: avg(H,2*Len)>avg(H,Len) AND avg(L,2*Len)<avg(L,Len) — convergent price range. Buy at Highest(H,LenK) stop, short at Lowest(L,LenK). Max 1 entry/day, not on last trade day.
exit_logic: Profit: opposite side N-bar extreme while still in triangle. Stop=Highest(H,Len)-Lowest(L,Len) from entry. Last trading day market exit.
risk_management: Stop=range over Len bars. Last trade day forced exit. 1 entry/day limit.
notable_techniques: Triangle via divergence of short vs long MA of H and L — long avg(H)>short avg(H) AND long avg(L)<short avg(L). Walk-forward with epoch-specific params per year.

entry_logic: Triangle V2: asymmetric LenS=4/LenL=11. avg(H,LenL)>avg(H,LenS) AND avg(L,LenL)<avg(L,LenS). Entry at Highest/Lowest(LenK) stop.
exit_logic: Reverse exit at opposite extreme. Stop=Highest(H,LenSTP)-Lowest(L,LenSTP). Last trade day exit.
risk_management: Separate LenSTP decouples stop width from breakout LenK. LenSTP evolves 6 to 10 to 8 across WF epochs.
notable_techniques: V2 separates triangle detection (LenS/LenL) from breakout (LenK) and stop (LenSTP) windows — three separate parameter groups for better control per regime.

entry_logic: Dual CDP: CDP1=(close[1]*2+H[1]+L[1])*0.25, CDPW=weekly version. Buy if CDP1>CDPW and first bar bullish. Entry midpoint (OpenD+L)*0.5 stop.
exit_logic: Jump loss if open gaps vs prior day range. 5-day trailing using prior day Low/High. Last trade day 13:00.
risk_management: Gap stoploss on direction reversal open. 5-day time trailing.
notable_techniques: Dual-timeframe CDP (daily vs weekly) as directional filter. First-bar direction confirmation. No-input strategy for robustness.

entry_logic: Narrow band breakout: avg(H,LenMean)-avg(L,LenMean)<HLdistance threshold. Breakout at Highest(H,LenBreak) or Lowest(L,LenBreak) stop.
exit_logic: Reverse exit at opposite extreme while compressed. 5-day trailing. 7% profit on _EntryH excursion. Hard 150pt stop.
risk_management: 7% target on max excursion. 150pt hard stop. 5-day time stop. _EntryH/_EntryL track peak favorable excursion.
notable_techniques: Volatility squeeze filter for breakout entry. _EntryH/_EntryL helpers track max excursion for percentage-of-max-move profit taking.

entry_logic: Amplitude breakout before 11:00: N-bar range > filter AND price breaks 4-day high/low. Also CDP 8% bands as mean-reversion limits. Two entry types: breakout + mean-reversion.
exit_logic: ATR two-tier stop (1x or 2x based on ATR<N). Profit 2-3% based on ATR regime. Last trade day extreme minus N stop.
risk_management: ATR-scaled stop with regime switching. Profit target changes with ATR.
notable_techniques: Dual entry: trend breakout + CDP 8% extreme mean-reversion. 4-day high/low filter. ATR regime-switching for stop sizing.

entry_logic: Gap+MA: open above prior high AND price retraces to ratio-weighted midpoint AND below 5hr MA AND fast MA > slow MA. Short mirrors.
exit_logic: Exit if opposing gap forms. Settlement day exit on close.
risk_management: Settlement forced close. Opposing gap position exit.
notable_techniques: Gap-open bias + dual MA filter (slow=fast*(1+_slow_m)). _opend_ratio controls pullback depth. recalcpersist for settle day detection.

entry_logic: Same gap+MA logic as Ed001: gap direction + MA alignment + pullback ratio filter.
exit_logic: Opposing gap closes position. Settle day close exit.
risk_management: Settle day mandatory exit. Gap direction stoploss.
notable_techniques: Settle day detection: third Wednesday rule (dom 15-27 + dow matrix). recalcpersist stateful flags across bars. Earlier scoring version (b21) of finalized strategy.

entry_logic: StochRSI: RSI(25) normalized (R-Rmin)/(Rmax-Rmin)*100, smoothed to SRMA=SMA(25). Long if SRMA>45; short if SRMA<55. Entry: open if already moving, else breakout stop.
exit_logic: Trailing at 2*len when weekly range profit exceeded. RSI<35 exit longs; RSI>65 exits shorts. Last trade day 13:30.
risk_management: Win_pts = maxpositionprofit/200. Profit trailing on weekly range. RSI mean-reversion loss exit.
notable_techniques: StochRSI: normalize RSI within its own N-bar high/low range for 0-100 bounded. Entry: cheaper at open if already moving vs breakout stop. Weekly range as dynamic profit target.

entry_logic: Camarilla at open: HL=0.5*(2-day avg range). Pivot=0.5*(prevClose+todayOpen). Levels at HL/4, HL/3, HL/2, HL above/below pivot. Buy if above RT3+RT4 midpoint; short below SP3+SP4. Counter: cross under SP3 buy at SP2; cross over RT3 short at RT2.
exit_logic: STL=25% of range if>100 else 30pts. Time exit after 12:30 at bar extremes. B2 exit at RT4; S2 at SP4. Last trade day exit.
risk_management: STL proportional to daily range. Counter-trend 3-bar early stop. win_pts>full range exits.
notable_techniques: Camarilla 8-level pivot. V2: recent P&L array adjusts time exit dynamically (losing regime exits earlier). Bar counter k tracks session position.

entry_logic: 3 ORB variants: B1/S1=narrowing to range boundary; B2/S2=bounced back; B3/S3=200pt+ overnight gap continuation. Window in+1 to in+12 (2x if recent trades losing).
exit_logic: B1 trailing stop at 3-bar high minus ST. B2 quick profit before noon. Time exit 13:20.
risk_management: 3-day range compression check. Count-if persistence: 60% bars below entry triggers exit.
notable_techniques: Entry window expands 2x when recent P&L negative (P&L feedback). Named entry differentiation (entryname) for separate exit management.

entry_logic: Weekly midpoint=(weekH+weekL)/2. Long if >1% above (momentum) or buy <7% below (extreme mean-reversion). Short mirrors. Window: first notin bars, one trade/day.
exit_logic: 100pt stop after day 1. Win>half-weekly-range (day 0) or *ratio (subsequent). Night session trailing from day extreme minus 100.
risk_management: DaytradeTimes counter. Day-1 vs multi-day profit targets. Night session stop from AmClosed_TX.
notable_techniques: Weekly midpoint structural reference. Dual thresholds: 1% momentum + 7% extreme reversal. Night session exit using AmClosed_TX (AM session closing price) reference.

entry_logic: Weekly CDP NH/NL pivot levels. Long if C>NH; short if C<NL. Daily CDP for stop reference. Max 2/week if recent trades positive else 1. Entry from first bar after 08:45.
exit_logic: Same-day stop=daily range; subsequent=weekly CDP. Win>weekly range exits. Thursday time stop at weekly extreme minus ratio*daily range.
risk_management: Entriesthisweek with day-of-week rollover detection. Performance-adaptive count (20-trade rolling avg). Thursday settlement awareness.
notable_techniques: Weekly+daily CDP dual-timeframe. Entriesthisweek resets on Monday. Performance-adaptive entry count. Thursday exit respects weekly settlement cycle.

entry_logic: KBar: HL=max(H-C, C-L, |O-C|). Long at Highest(H,highestbar(HL,length))+Highest(HL,length) stop — breakout above peak-bar-anchored level. Short at mirror.
exit_logic: Exit at opposing stop. If >2*length bars and 60% of bars against position: persistence exit.
risk_management: Symmetric entry/exit stops using largest HL bar as anchor. Persistence filter: countif(H<entryprice)>0.6*barssinceentry.
notable_techniques: highestbar(HL,length) as dynamic lookback anchor — largest momentum bar position determines range expansion threshold. Custom HL metric captures all bar direction types.

entry_logic: DIF=C-Average(avgprice,Len). Long if DIF rising. Entry stop at max(OpenD+stl*0.5, dayHigh-1). stl=min(2-day ranges)*ratio. Backhand on extreme opens. Counter-trend protection reversal.
exit_logic: 9% profit limit. ATR trailing from _EntryH/_EntryL*Len/10 scale. XAverage midpoint cross exit after 12:00. Last trade day 13:30.
risk_management: stl=min(2-day range)*ratio ATR-scaled. _EntryH/_EntryL for ATR trailing from peak. Multi-exit with named entry differentiation.
notable_techniques: XAverage(h,k) vs day midpoint for trend quality. Backhand protection: if counter-trade fails immediately reverse again. Multi-layer exit with named entries.

entry_logic: 3-day aggregate candlestick shadows: upshadow=3day_high-max(open[2],C); dnshadow=min(open[2],C)-3day_low; body=totl-both. Long if dnshadow>body AND upshadow<ratio*totl (hammer). Short if upshadow>body (shooting star). Entry at 3-day extreme breakout. 2-day post-settlement buffer.
exit_logic: Exit when opposite shadow forms with win>totl OR loss>totl/2. Exit at day high/low midpoint.
risk_management: afterLTD prevents trading immediately post-settlement. Holds across days, exits on shadow flip.
notable_techniques: Multi-day aggregate candle shadow decomposition over 3-day window. Shadow dominance ratio filter for pattern purity. Post-settlement cool-down period.

entry_logic: Correction depth: feature=Highest(L,len)-Lowest(H,len). Positive=lows above highs=bullish compression. If feature>ATR*(1+r/100): correction=momentum continuation, long at (dayH+H)/2. If feature<ATR*(1-r/100): expansion, short. Entry after 09:30, 2-day post-settlement buffer.
exit_logic: Persistence exit: if >len bars held AND >80% bars against position: market exit. Last trade day 13:30.
risk_management: afterLTD buffer. 80% persistence filter. Minimal hard stop — relies on time+persistence.
notable_techniques: Highest(L,len)-Lowest(H,len) as correction metric: positive = lows above highs = bullish compression. r parameter as ATR multiplier. Clean single-concept strategy.

entry_logic: 4-day ADA session OHLC segments. avg(max+min segment distances)/2=dist. Buy if (c+c[1])/2>Bmove=(close[1]+open[0])/2+avgmin. Reverse entry on zone boundary crossings.
exit_logic: Multi-level trailing: max_win>1-2x avgmax trail at entry; >2-3x trail at entry+80% max_win. Big stop 400pts. Night session stop. Time 04:30-05:00.
risk_management: 400pt max loss. Overnight session stop using AM close comparison. Multi-level trailing by win magnitude.
notable_techniques: ADA/ADP OHLC storage arrays for session-spanning lookback. dentryL/dentryS counters for day-side trade tracking. Chart annotation colored by position direction.

entry_logic: Island reversal: two opposite gaps within pp bars AND |gap1+gap2|<ATR*pp2/100. Double gap: two same-direction gaps, breakout at kday-period high/low. Market entry if last trade won but current position open-losing.
exit_logic: Island stop=avg(L or H, bars between gaps). Double gap exit on opposing gap or midpoint. Settlement exit on close.
risk_management: gapbar[] array tracks bar count of each gap. Dynamic stop period from gap spacing.
notable_techniques: Island reversal: opposite gaps + near-cancellation (|sum|<recent ATR). Double gap=momentum. Special continuation entry: prior trade won but current open-losing = winner pattern continues.

entry_logic: ORB+ with trend: after >11 bars, long if avg(L,k)>(2*close[1]+high[1])/3, entry at dayHigh-ATR(k) stop. DTrueRange_BN=custom daily TR using prior close.
exit_logic: Loss stop: entryprice-diff*gg. Momentum failure cross: exit or reverse. 7% day move triggers 3-bar trailing. Day end exit.
risk_management: diff=rolling avg daily TRs. Reversal option if losing before 11:00 in volatile market.
notable_techniques: DTrueRange_BN: more accurate daily TR using prior close vs day H/L for futures gaps. Adaptive reversal instead of just stopping in early session.

entry_logic: 3 consecutive same-direction bars: countif((c-o)>(h-l)*HLratio, 3)=3. Filter: |c-o[2]|<DATR*OverRatio. Context: if expansion exceeded AND weekly extreme hit: counter-trend entry instead of trend.
exit_logic: If >10 bars and highestbar stalled: trail at (entryprice+dayLow*2)/3. Day close exit. Last trade day early exit.
risk_management: SetStopLoss(DATR(3)*bigpointvalue) — 3-day custom ATR hard stop.
notable_techniques: HLratio filters doji/indecision bars. OverRatio prevents post-extreme-expansion entry. Context filter flips to counter-trend at weekly extremes. DATR vs intrabar ATR distinction.

entry_logic: DayVolatility decomposed: HCOdiffsum=up gap sum, LCOdiffsum=down gap sum. Counter-trend (before 09:00): 3-day DV total>3x avg bar range AND gap-up=short. Trend (after k>in bars): up-DV dominant AND gap-up=long.
exit_logic: Backhand entry dynamic. Time exit 13:25/13:35. setexitonclose.
risk_management: Counter-trend only pre-market. Trend entries after in bars. Dynamic backhand level from rolling close extremes.
notable_techniques: DayVolatility decomposes multi-day open gaps into directional components. Ratio directional-to-total volatility as trend strength. Different timing thresholds for counter-trend vs trend.

entry_logic: Locked S/R from MA crossovers: Support locked at Lowest(C,148) when price crosses above Avg(L,148). Resistance locked at Highest(C,148) on down cross. Trade: if locked S/R stable and price crosses again = breakout entry.
exit_logic: Profit: limit at opposite locked level. Stop: if level breaks. Reversal: if >pct% time below locked support = counter entry at 1% SL.
risk_management: Locked levels update only on new MA crossovers. Time-below persistence filter. 1% SL for reversal.
notable_techniques: Persistent locked S/R (structural levels, not dynamic MA lines). Sustained time-below-support = structure broken = regime change signal.

entry_logic: Composite weight=(NetBreakTimes+NetRedGreen+NetUpDn)/3. Long if weight increased >scorethres AND avg(weight)>0 AND price above prior ADA OHLC ratios. Entry at day high or avgVol-extended prior high.
exit_logic: Exit if avg(weight) turns negative. Persistence: >50% bars below entry after 1hr. Profit: win_pts>=avgHO. Session close.
risk_management: Win target=avgHO (avg high-open spread). 60-bar persistence stop. NoNight holiday detection.
notable_techniques: SumBH/SumBL tracks accumulated close-to-new-high distances for momentum quality. AvgHO/AvgOL asymmetric profit targets. 3-component composite weight score.

entry_logic: Two consecutive gap-open days: condition1=openD>(max(O,C)[1]*2+H[1])/3. Long if two consecutive bullish gap opens AND each open>prior open. Short: two consecutive bearish gap opens AND declining opens.
exit_logic: Stop: two consecutive opposite gap opens while in position. Timeout: 4 days short, 10 days long. P/L at ratio% (3-4.5%). Last trade day re-entry on weekly range.
risk_management: Asymmetric holding (long=10d, short=4d). Symmetric P&L stops at ratio%.
notable_techniques: Consecutive gap-open direction with escalating opens as confirmation. Asymmetric holding periods (long bias). No intrabar signals — only daily open observations.

entry_logic: VCP: variance_sum_fast/len_fast > variance_sum_slow/len_slow = variance acceleration. Box high/low = prior close +/- stoploss/2 with _stoploss_adj multiplier if last trade was stoploss. Buy above box_high; short below box_low.
exit_logic: Tier 1 (max_profit<threshold): hard stop at entry+/-stoploss. Tier 2 (>=threshold): trailing=entry+mpp-ATR(hour_kbar)/sqrt(barssinceentry). Timeout: k_to_stop bars with insufficient profit.
risk_management: Box width = rolling session variance. Sqrt-of-time trailing tightening. Wider box after stoploss exit.
notable_techniques: Incremental O(1) variance update for efficiency. VCP via fast vs slow variance MA ratio. GCD-based LCM period harmonization. Square-root-of-time trailing stop (tightens as trade matures).

entry_logic: LSS pivot: LSSHigh=avg of 4 projections: (1)close[1]+3-day avg upward range, (2)high[1]+3-day high progression, (3)high[1], (4)2*pivot-low[1]. LSSLow mirror. Entry: price crosses LSS AND dual MA filter; buy at 3-bar high.
exit_logic: Stop: 100pt base x multiplier (1-3x based on gap+daily range). StochKD<30 exit longs. Profit trail if prior day excursion>ratio%. Day-of-entry vs next-day rules differ.
risk_management: Context-aware stop multiplier. Stochastic momentum quality exit. value99 prior-high tracking for same-day trailing.
notable_techniques: 4-projection LSS for robust S/R. Dual MA trend filter. Context stop multiplier based on gap direction AND daily range size. Stochastic as momentum quality filter.

entry_logic: AccumSwingIndex (Wilder) crosses over/under SMA(105). Also Guava limit orders at +-7% from prior (close+open)/2 midpoint for mean-reversion. Max 2 entries/day.
exit_logic: Initial stop: entry low-2*ATR(13). After 2 days: if overnight gap reverses, exit at (6*lowD-2*highD)/4. V3: if short and win>2*avgDRange exit. Last trade day 13:30.
risk_management: 2*ATR first 2 days. Gap-direction exit using avgGap reference. 20-day avgDRange for profit scaling.
notable_techniques: AccumSwingIndex (Wilder) captures true swing with gap adjustment — rare in retail systems. Guava 7% extreme mean-reversion orders as secondary income. AvgGap context filter for exit trigger.

name: NV2108004_TX15M_Bonny_LT
logic: Dynamic channel breakout using rolling Len-day HH/HC/LL/LC to set up/dn levels. Shake-filter suppresses entry when mid direction is unstable (pos() of oscillation < Len/4). Multi-layer exit: channel stop, fixed stop, jump-gap trailing.
indicators: Shake oscillator (mid direction count over Len/2 periods)
entry: C breaks up/dn computed from prior Len days max(HH-LC, HC-LL)*Lratio/Sratio; extra breakout filter when shake < Len/4 adds ATR(5h) to threshold
exit: Stop at opposite channel (dn for long); fixed stop at min(pt, daily ATR); jump-gap trailing after 2-day gap with profit; nobreak counter exit after 3 days without hitting target
notable: Shake-filter unique: counts oscillation of mid-direction over half-period to reduce choppy entries. Jump-gap regime tightens stop when asset gaps through prior 2 highs and is profitable.

name: NV2109005_TX6M_Cindy_LT
logic: CDP pivot system on 6-min bars. Computes mid/up/dn from prior day HLC. Enters trend or anti-trend based on gap expansion. Adaptive profit target uses running average of daily gap size (AvgGap). BackHand reversal logic when price extends and then re-enters.
entry: Trend: C breaks max(close[1] up) long between bar in-notin range; Anti-trend: price trapped outside CDP band with reversal candle; BackHand: reverse when price re-enters after extended move
exit: Trend exit at min(lowd[1] dn) for long; ratio*AvgGap profit target with trailing using running daily gap avg; reversal positions exit at mid or entry price next day; force exit session end for B2/S2
notable: AvgGap running average as adaptive profit target scales with recent daily volatility. BackHand reversal logic allows full strategy reversal embedded within same framework.

name: NV2110006_TX3M_FLT
logic: AM vs PM session bias with counter-trend filter. Uses AmCloseD_TX (AM close tracking array) vs prior day to determine directional bias. Enters AGAINST the bias if price extends away from open by AvgHL (contrarian setup in PM session).
indicators: AvgHL = avg(daily HL range Len days)/2
entry: After first 140 bars (pm session): if AM close stronger than prior day AND price rises above open+AvgHL buy at day high stop. If AM weaker AND falls below open-AvgHL short at day low.
exit: Stop at day low/high; profit trailing starts at 2*AvgHL gain: trail = win_pts*(0.2 + 0.01*bars_since_entry); AM session exits use prior day open/close levels
notable: Trailing formula with time-decay component (0.01 per bar) is novel - trail tightens as position ages forcing earlier exit. Contrarian AM-bias entry after drift beyond expected range.

name: NV2112008_TX60M_FLT
logic: Linear regression trend + midprice momentum dual confirmation. Long when LinReg < 0 AND falling consistently (>half of Len2 bars) AND avg(midprice) rising. Entry stop uses HighestBar adaptive multiplier: doubles lookback when prior trade was loss AND sequence confirmed.
entry: Long: LinReg<0 all Len2 values<0 >half rising + midprice rising: buy at Highest(H Len2*multiplier) where multiplier=2 if prior bars bullish+prior loss, else 1
exit: Trailing when win_pts>=pt: exit = entryprice + 0.1*count*win_pts (accelerates with each profitable bar since entry); initial stop = Lowest(L Len2) for long
notable: Adaptive entry doubles lookback when coming off a loss to force stronger confirmation. Profit multiplier builds with each favorable bar since entry - self-reinforcing trailing mechanism.

name: NV2202009_TX300M_LT
logic: Asymmetric channel breakout: uses different lookback for long (Buyday=13) vs short (Shortday=17). Monthly DD circuit breaker with net profit tracking. Trend filter: exits if N/2 consecutive lower highs/lows detected after profitable move.
indicators: Asymmetric HLCC range Buyday=13 for buy Shortday=17 for short
Monthly net profit DD monitor level=200k
entry: Buy = C + Kbuy*BuyRange (from Buyday lookback); Short = C - Kshort*SellRange (from Shortday lookback)
exit: Long: exit if countif(lower daily lows Shortday/2) >= Shortday/4 AND LowestBar>0; monthly DD: flagM if month loss > 200k or drawdown from month peak > 200k forces flat
notable: Asymmetric lookback for bull vs bear: different trend memory periods. Monthly circuit breaker forces flat for rest of month. Streak-based exit not fixed price level.

name: TimChen009_TX_30mBBI_LOS
logic: BBI (Bull and Bear Index = avg of 4 MAs) dual-speed filter: BBI_S (fast 1,2,4,8x base) vs BBI_L (slow 54,108,216,432x base). VHF oscillator gates entries (VHF > 0.58). Extreme price exit guard (>9% vs prior AM close).
entry: BBI_S rising + C > BBI_S + VHF>0.58 + BBI_S > BBI_L: buy at market. Short: BBI_S falling + C < BBI_S + VHF>0.58 + BBI_S < BBI_L.
exit: BBI_S falls below BBI_L for long exit; stoploss-2: if HighestBar >= 40% of bars since entry sell at avg(open today + yesterday low); extreme-3: if price moves >9% from prior AM close exit
notable: BBI uses geometric scaling (1/2/4/8x). Extreme price guard prevents holding through limit moves. VHF as genuine trend/chop filter. 9% circuit handles Taiwan market circuit breaker.

name: TX_HLdistance15K
logic: Gap open continuation: enters if open today > yesterday high AND majority of bars closed bullish over 96-bar window. Entry uses partial lookback breakout (excludes bars since highest bar was made).
indicators: Highest(H len-HighestBar(H len)) partial breakout level
entry: Long: open > prev high + >50% of 96 bars close up -> buy at Highest(H len-HighestBar) stop. Short: open < prev low + majority down.
exit: Stoploss = entry - (Highest(C Len)-Lowest(C Len))/2 half close range; 7% circuit breaker if today high > open*1.07
notable: Partial-lookback breakout excludes bars since last high to avoid stale resistance levels. 7% circuit breaker handles Taiwan limit-up. Half close-range as volatility-adjusted stop.

name: a3001_TX_20210204_LOd
logic: ATR-filtered dual-MA crossover with low-volatility regime switch. Uses 1.5-day and 2.5-day moving averages. Enters only when HL gap exceeds ATR confirming meaningful move. StdDev < threshold triggers switch from trend-following to breakout-fading.
entry: Early session (k < half-day): if today high > yesterday high + ATR AND midprice crosses below short MA: buy at L+5. Reversal after 100 bars: if position wrong and gap against position short.
exit: Low-volatility: when StdDev < threshold flip at N-day extremes (Highest/Lowest over somedays). Always exit at lastTradeDay.
notable: Low-volatility detection triggers regime switch from trend to mean-reversion. StdDev threshold as regime classifier. Variable N-day period based on x parameter WF-optimized.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略程式碼 TX_MAHL_FDT_1.md
name: TXF_MAHL_FDT_1
logic: Morning open comparison with adaptive MA slope filter. Requires new open > prior day close AND prior day open AND MA rising. Adaptive MA: doubles period (N to 2N) after losing trade to force stronger next-signal confirmation.
indicators: Moving Average(C N or 2N based on prior trade profit)
entry: Condition: newopen (captured at 6-bar mark) > prior AmClose AND > prior AmOpen AND MA rising. Buy at HH(6) stop if C>MA. Short: inverse.
exit: Fixed stop 40pts; profit trailer at 200pts gain with 40pt trail; day exit at 13:30 AM session
notable: Adaptive MA length: doubles period after losing trade forces stronger confirmation next time. Dual-open comparison ensures overnight conviction before entry.

name: a32201TC60ML
logic: RSI extreme mean reversion on 60min bars. Enters when smoothed RSI (3-bar average) > 85 or < 15. Exits when RSI reverses through 10/90 threshold. Momentum exit: if majority of bars since entry close against position, reverse to day extreme stop.
entry: Buy when RSI_avg < 15 (oversold); Short when RSI_avg > 85 (overbought). Must wait 3 bars into session.
exit: Exit when RSI < 10 for long (extreme exit); momentum exit: if more than half bars since entry closing against position reverse to day high/low stop
notable: Triple RSI smoothing reduces false extremes. Momentum-based reversal exit switches from exit to reverse-position entry when position clearly failing.

name: a306M03MD0
logic: Linear regression angle + consecutive close momentum with 10% pullback trailing. Enters only before 11:00 if LRAngle > threshold for 5 bars AND 3 consecutive closes in same direction. Entry at opening 3-bar high/low.
indicators: Opening 3-bar High/Low TH/TL from session start
entry: After 3 session bars: 3+ consecutive higher closes + LRAngle>36 for 5 bars -> buy at TH(3-bar-high) stop. Short: inverse. Only before 11:00.
exit: When win_pts > max(TH-TL 40): trail to entryprice + (maxH-entryprice)*0.1 (10% pullback from intraday high); momentum-reverse exit: 3 consecutive closes against + outside entry-str; force exit at 13:35
notable: 10% pullback trailing from intraday high protects gains while riding trends. LRAngle threshold filters direction quality. Morning-only entry window concentrates on strong momentum.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略腳本 - Wesley002_TX_2107SQX0001_DT.md
name: Wesley002_TX_2107SQX001_DT
logic: Heiken Ashi trend filter with dynamic stop adjustment based on position quality. All-same-direction HA bars for N periods signals trend. Adaptive SL: halved if >50% bars closed against position since entry.
indicators: Dynamic stoploss halved if majority bars against
entry: Long: HA Lows all rising for Period=8 bars -> buy at current High stop. Short: HA Highs all falling -> short at Low stop. Lunch session (12:15-12:45) with extra close direction filter.
exit: Adaptive SL: if >50% bars since entry closed against halve stop distance. Profit target at prior day low. 7% daily circuit breaker (Taiwan limit-up guard). EOD exit 4 bars before close.
notable: Halved stoploss key innovation: dynamically adjusts risk based on position quality since entry. Flash crash protection at 7% daily limit. Lunch session extension with extra confirmation.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略腳本 - Wesley003_TX_2110KPower_LO.md
name: Wesley003_TX_2110KPower_LO
logic: KPower = abs(LPower-SPower) > StdDev for trend strength measurement. LPower=sum(C-L 4bars) captures buying pressure; SPower=sum(H-C 4bars) captures selling pressure. Three-day consecutive high/low constraint confirms multi-day trend. Monthly loss circuit breaker.
entry: Long: LowD(0)>=LowD(1)>=LowD(2) (3-day higher lows) AND LPower>SPower AND KPower>StdDev -> buy at TypicalPrice stop.
exit: SL at entryprice - SLC*StdDev. Jump-gap protection on open. Fast PT at 3.5%*price. Extended PT: PTC*StdDev with PercentRank>=90% AND new high condition.
notable: KPower as directional momentum combining bull and bear pressure magnitudes. PercentRank exit gate: only take profit when price at 90th percentile of recent range. Monthly DD circuit breaker.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略腳本 - Wesley004_TX_2112SQX003_LT.md
name: Wesley004_TX_2112SQX003_LT
logic: Three-bar reversal pattern with Heiken Ashi entry trigger and STD-based trailing stop. Pattern: Close[3]<Low[2] AND Close[2]>Low[1] AND TypicalPrice rising (bullish recovery from false breakdown). HA entry at HA_High of 1 bar ago.
entry: Long: 3-bar recovery (prior close pierced low then reversed) -> buy at HA_High[1] stop. Short: 3-bar distribution -> short at HA_Low[1] stop.
exit: Fixed SL at entryprice - StopLoss(145pts). Trailing stop only moves when in profit AND improvement better than current trail: TSC=2.1*StdDev as trail distance.
notable: Captures false breakdown recoveries (bear traps). Trailing only moves in profit direction and only if improvement - prevents widening. StdDev trail auto-adapts to volatility.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略腳本 PTstartup105_TX_PivotReversal04_DT.md
name: PTstartup105_TX_PivotReversal04_DT
logic: Swing point reversal after gap open. Detects prior swing extremes using SwingHigh/SwingLow functions with Strength parameter. Enters when gap direction matches swing and price approaches swing extreme. Filters extreme gap sizes.
entry: If gap up AND prior swing high detected -> limit buy at swing high - 1 tick. Only in first 30 bars of session. Filters abs(C-CloseD(1)) < STP to avoid runaway gaps.
exit: No trailing stop - exits only at 2 bars before session close (market order). Full-day ride or close.
notable: Post-gap reversal entry near prior pivot. No profit target - full day ride. Very simple exit relative to complex entry. SwingHigh/Low detection with configurable Strength period.

name: LanDi001_TX_BIAS_50mK_LT
logic: BIAS indicator trend-following with bounded zone entry. BIAS = 10000*(C-MA)/MA. Enters when BIAS in bounded range (bias to ratio*bias) AND has been at local low for 5+ bars (momentum turning). Avoids settlement days.
entry: Long: BIAS > 105 AND BIAS < 4.75*105 AND BIAS at local low 5+ bars ago -> buy market. Short: BIAS < -105 AND BIAS > -4.75*105 AND BIAS at local high.
exit: Long exit: BIAS turns negative (mean reversion); BIAS > ratio*bias (extended) -> sell at 2-bar low. Settlement day exit at 11:00.
notable: Bounded BIAS zone 1x-4.75x threshold avoids both timid and extreme readings. lowestBar filter ensures BIAS recently bottomed out (momentum turning point). Avoids settlement and prior settlement day.

name: b3004_TX_PriceInterval5K_LO
logic: Adaptive regime-switching strategy: large-interval (trending) vs small-interval (compression). Uses 6-day and 12-day avg HL distance to classify regime. Four progressive long entry levels based on position and context. Adaptive exit with 2% circuit breaker.
indicators: avgCDDist = avg(max distance close to H or L 6 days)
entry: Large-interval (avgHL >= avgHL2): multiple signals from close avg comparison midpoint vs yesterday TPx candle vs open. Small-interval (avgHL < avgHL2): 3-day pattern with internal structure confirmation.
exit: Trailing: if win_pts > 2*STP trail at 50% retracement of gain. Initial stop entryH - STP. 2% circuit breaker from entry price.
notable: Regime detection by comparing 6-day vs 12-day range averages: larger recent range = trending. Up to 4 entry signals per side. Progressive confidence scoring with position awareness.

name: a3005_TX_wCDP20K_FLO
logic: Daily CDP + Weekly CDP combined framework. dCDP from daily HLC, wCDP computed on Wednesday from 5-day weighted average. Two regime modes: wide (avgRange>avgRange2) for trending and narrow for compression with different entry logic.
indicators: Weekly CDP computed each Wednesday from 5-day OHLC averages
avgRange = avg(R2-S2 Len days) volatility regime
entry: Wide regime: enter if dCDP trending + wCDP bullish + C >= R1. Narrow regime: multiple conditions comparing dCDP to wCDP trend AND weekly trend AND position in range.
exit: If win_pts < range*ratio trail from EntryH by range+avgRange/4; if win_pts >= range*ratio trail at 80% of gains; 2% circuit breaker
notable: Weekly CDP as multi-day S/R anchor combined with daily CDP. Range-based profit target adapts to recent daily volatility. Two regime modes with entirely different entry logic.

name: Drschnabel_TX_trend_oscillation20k_LT
logic: Dual MA trend filter with golden-ratio (phi=1.618) period relationship + KD oscillator crossover entry. AvgDif = MA(56) - MA(91). Two entry modes: trend (when MA56>MA91) and counter-trend (when MA56<MA91 but FastD extreme).
entry: Trend: C>MA56 + AvgDif>0 + FastK crosses above (50-KDif=34) -> buy at H stop. Counter: C>MA56 + AvgDif<0 + FastD>84 -> buy at rolling high breakout.
exit: Long exit: C < (AvgSlow + entryprice)/2 midpoint between MA91 and entry -> exit market. Extended profit: C > AvgSlow + 590 -> exit.
notable: Golden ratio (phi=1.618) for MA period relationship. Counter-trend entry when short MA diverges from long. Conditional no-trade filter: skip if traded within last 12 bars.

name: GavinLu008_TX_DonChianChannel_20m_LT
logic: Donchian Channel breakout with EMA(320) very-long-term trend filter. DonHigh/DonLow of 46-bar Donchian. Entry when channel expanding (DonHigh rising 2 consecutive bars) AND price on correct side of long-term EMA.
entry: Long: DonHigh rising 2 consecutive bars + C > EMA -> buy market. Short: DonLow falling 2 bars + C < EMA. Only 1 trade per day allowed.
exit: If win_pts > maxWinPoint*maxRatio: full exit. DonLow as trailing reference for long.
notable: EMA(320) on 20min bars = ~26 days long-term trend filter. maxRatio=5.8x ensures capturing full trend legs before exiting. Channel expansion as momentum confirmation.

name: Jack106_TX_Neckline10K_L0
logic: Neckline breakout based on 2-day candle pattern (morning star / evening star type). Detects bearish-then-bullish or bullish-then-bearish daily candle sequence. Enters at average of the two prior day highs as neckline level.
entry: Long: Close[2]<Open[2] (bearish day) AND Close[1]>Open[1] (bullish reversal) AND Close[1]>Close[2] AND today C>Open -> buy at avg(High[1] High[2]) stop.
exit: Reversal exit: 3 consecutive bars H below yesterday low + bearish bar -> reverse to short if profitable. Wrong-direction exit within 1 bar at market. Last trade day close.
notable: Neckline = midpoint of two-day swing as natural S/R. Pattern reversal double-duty: when 3 bars fail and momentum reverses flip position. Simple but robust entry combining candle and gap.

file: E:/投資交易/pla_md/signal/(4)策略腳本Jack112_TX_HLR13K_LT_Jack 軍邑軍宇.md
name: Jack112_TX_HLR13K_LT
logic: 3-layer rolling high/low lookback at different day offsets (t, t-1day, t-2day) for convergent trend confirmation. Detects descending low structure at three timeframes simultaneously. Entry at 1-day-ago highest close during 9:30-13:30.
indicators: Highest(C[1] TLen) Highest(C[TLen] TLen) Highest(C[TLen] TLen*2) three-layer lookback
Lowest variants at same three offsets
entry: Long: value4<value5<value6 (3-layer descending lows = holding support) AND NOT value2>value1 (not yet breaking high resistance) -> buy at value1 stop.
exit: Same-day candle reversal exit. WrongBuy/WrongSell: immediate failure within 1 bar exits at market. Profit target: 1.4% of price. Settlement: exit at 13:00.
notable: 3-layer lookback structure at t/t-1day/t-2day provides layered trend confirmation. Immediate failure exit (WrongBuy) within 1 bar prevents large losses. 1.4% fixed profit target.

name: b25b25AVgirl_202106
logic: Bar-timing analysis: tracks when each session H and L are made (Hbar Lbar variables). Enters when LowestBar > Lbar (new lows forming later than the established low bar) signaling continuation. Candle direction count provides momentum adjustment to entry threshold.
indicators: Hbar = bar number when daily H was made (updated each bar)
Lbar = bar number when daily L was made
LowestBar(L fmk) HighestBar(H fmk) position tests
entry: Condition1 (breakout): new low forms after expected low bar AND closed down from open with direction count adjustment. Condition11 (gap): LowestBar > max(Lbar Hbar) AND open gap up -> long at highest H since key bar.
exit: Long: sell if prior day close < today low (trend fails) -> stop at midpoint. Short: inverse. Day exit at 13:30.
notable: Bar-timing analysis of when H/L form within session is novel - later-than-expected low suggests later-session continuation. Momentum adjustment to entry filter based on directional candle count.
