entry_logic: Dual MA system (len=6, len2=127). Entry long: close>ma2, LinearRegAngle>10 for 3 bars, MHL=|ma1-ma2| expanding, price above daily high stop. Short mirror. Block trades 6-day window around settlement.
exit_logic: Exit on opposing MA condition using 2-day low/high min/max. Hard stop=128pts from entry. Win>3x stop: market exit. Last trade day time exit.
risk_management: LastTradeDay (3rd Wednesday). 6-day settlement exclusion window. 3x stop trailing profit trigger.
notable_techniques: LinearRegAngle(c,len2)>10 for 3 bars as trend quality filter. MHL=absolute MA distance as spread expansion. LastTradeDay via 3rd Wednesday algorithm.

entry_logic: MACD-based. var0=MACD(12,26); histogram=MACD-signal. Long: |histogram|>pp AND MACD>0 AND histogram rising. Entry stop at max of 2-day highs. Short mirror.
exit_logic: Persistence exit: >50% of bars since entry against position. Hard stop=stl pts. Last trade day exit.
risk_management: Persistence filter: countif(c<c[1],barssinceentry)>0.5*barssinceentry. Entry window: non-settlement days only.
notable_techniques: MACD histogram momentum with persistence-based exit. 2-day high/low range for stop placement. Clean MACD directional system.

entry_logic: CDP reversal. cdp=(H+L+2C)/4; R1=2*cdp-L; S1=2*cdp-H. Long if avg(c,2)>R1 AND low>avg(H,len). Max 1 entry per day.
exit_logic: Hard stop=stl pts. Open price stop at OpenD(0). Session end exit (dual time handling pre/post 1170515). Settlement setexitonclose.
risk_management: CDP from previous ADA session OHLC. Max 1 entry/day. Dual session exit split at date threshold.
notable_techniques: CDP formula with double-close: (H+L+2C)/4. ADA OHLC functions for cross-session lookback. Dual-session exit split.

entry_logic: Heiken Ashi consecutive bars. countif(HA_low>HA_low[1],Period)=Period for all bars. Entry at high[0] stop morning (08:45-12:15). Lunch (12:15-12:45) requires extra price confirmation.
exit_logic: 4-tier SL: flash crash protection first 3 bars; dynamic SL halved if >50% bars below entry; trailing on Low[1] after PT; 7% circuit breaker.
risk_management: Constant=0.001*(3-day median) adaptive stop. 2 entries/day max. EOD exit 4 bars before close.
notable_techniques: Constant=median*0.001 as tick-adaptive stop. Heiken Ashi consecutive bars filter. SL halves when frequently against entry.

entry_logic: KPower=|LPower-SPower| vs StdDev(close). LPower=4-bar sum(close-low); SPower=4-bar sum(high-close). Rising lows + KPower>STD: long at TypicalPrice. Monthly/maxDD circuit breaker.
exit_logic: SL=SLC*STD from entry. Jump SL on gap open. Fast PT at FPT*EntryPrice. Extreme PT at percentrank>=90. 7% day move circuit breaker.
risk_management: Monthly loss + maxDD via NetPM/maxDM arrays. Reset each 3rd-Wednesday. flagM blocks entries after limit hit.
notable_techniques: KPower: net bull/bear force from 4 bars. percentrank for parabolic extremes. Dual monthly+rolling drawdown circuit breakers.

entry_logic: 3-bar price reversal. Long: close[3]<low[2] AND close[2]>low[1] AND TypicalPrice>TypicalPrice[1]. Entry at HA_high[1] stop. Short mirror.
exit_logic: Fixed SL=145pts. STD trailing: TSC*StdDev(Close,STDLen). Trailing activates only from profitable territory. Settlement setexitonclose.
risk_management: Hard stop + volatility-scaled trailing. Trailing only activates when profitable. STDLen=30-bar volatility.
notable_techniques: 3-bar false-breakout detection. Heiken Ashi entry. WF uses TSC on StdDev as adaptive trail multiplier.

entry_logic: SwingHigh/Low pivot with gap filter. Long: gap-up open AND swing high forms, entry at high[Strength]-1pt stop. Entry window bars 3-30. |close-prev_close|<STP price change filter.
exit_logic: Time exit: 2 bars before session end. Market order only.
risk_management: Entry window bars 3-30. Price change filter for volatile opens. Gap direction filter. No hard stop, time-based only.
notable_techniques: SwingHigh(1,High,Strength,Strength+1) breakout + gap direction. Two-stage: pivot forms then breakout, reset if price returns.

entry_logic: BIAS deviation: vBIAS=10000*(close-MA)/MA. Long if bias>thold AND bias<ratio*thold AND lowestBar(vBIAS,10)>5 (persistent not spike). Non-settlement, 1 entry/day, 08:50-13:30.
exit_logic: Opposite bias crossed: market exit. bias>ratio*bias: trailing via lowest(L,2) stop.
risk_management: Double non-settlement check (prev day also). Max 1 entry/day. Window 08:50-13:30.
notable_techniques: BIAS*10000 as % deviation. lowestBar>5 ensures persistence. ratio*bias as parabolic boundary. Double settlement filter.

entry_logic: Adaptive volatility regime. avgHLDist vs avgHLDist2. Large interval: multi-condition close/open direction. Small interval: breakout on higher-highs/lows. Multiple reversal entries (L2-L4) based on performance.
exit_logic: win<=STP*2: exit EntryH-STP. win>STP*2: trailing at entryprice+50% win. Settlement 13:00-13:45.
risk_management: STP = max(avgHLDist2,avgHLDist)*ratio. EntryH/EntryL custom tracking. Regime switches on volatility.
notable_techniques: Short vs long HL distance as volatility regime. Multiple reversal entries within same position. Trailing as % of unrealized gain.

entry_logic: Weekly+Daily CDP dual-pivot. dCDP=(H+L+3C)/5. wCDP=5-session weighted average including AM closes. Large range: CDP trending + price above/below R1/S1. Small range: weekly vs daily CDP direction comparison.
exit_logic: win<range*ratio: exit when EntryH drops by range. win>=range*ratio: trail at 80% max win. 2% adverse move: hard stop. Settlement 13:00-13:45.
risk_management: AmClosed_TX for night session data. 2% hard stop. Range=2*(H-L).
notable_techniques: wCDP uses AmClosed_TX for accurate weekly close. Weekly vs daily CDP context. avgRange short/long regime switch.

entry_logic: AvgDif=MA(len)-MA(len*1.618). Trend: close>fastMA AND AvgDif>0 AND StochK crosses up through 50-KDif. Counter-trend: close>fastMA AND AvgDif<0 AND fastD>50+KDif. Entry at highD stop.
exit_logic: Long exit: close<(AvgSlow+entry)/2. Extended profit: close>AvgSlow+STL. Settlement setexitonclose.
risk_management: condition99: last 12 bars all flat before entry. Prior positionprofit>=0 filter.
notable_techniques: Golden ratio 1.618 for slow MA period. AvgDif direction separates trend vs counter modes. 12-bar flat check prevents overtrading.

entry_logic: Donchian Channel breakout + EMA. Long: countif(DonHigh>DonHigh[1],2)=2 AND close>EMA(320). No same-day re-entry, no settlement days.
exit_logic: Break-even at win>=DonWidth/2. Max profit at win>=DonWidth*maxRatio. SL: close<max(EMA,DonAvg). Profit trail on 2-day midpoint.
risk_management: exitdate check prevents same-day re-entry. 4-tier progressive exit.
notable_techniques: DonAvg=(DonHigh+DonLow)/2 as midline for exits. Two consecutive channel expansion bars for entry. maxRatio*width as target.

entry_logic: 3-bar neckline pattern. Long: day2 bearish AND day1 bullish AND day1.close>day2.close AND today bullish. Entry stop at midpoint of day1+day2 high. Max 2 entries/day.
exit_logic: Exit1: 3 bars high<prev_day_low + bearish close. Exit2: first 2 bars below 2-bar low. Settlement setexitonclose.
risk_management: NoTradeday blocks trading day after settlement. Profitable reversal: counter-entry allowed if trade in profit.
notable_techniques: Neckline at midpoint of two-day high range. Bearish-bullish-bullish confirmation. Profitable-then-reverse counter pattern.

entry_logic: Higher-low rising pattern. Triple-timeframe close highs. condition1: daily lows rising sequence. Long at recent high on rising lows. Short on falling highs. Time gate 09:30-13:30.
exit_logic: Same-day: low<prev_day_low exit. Multi-day: close<prev_day_low. Gap+bearish bar exit. Win>=profit%*entry: market exit.
risk_management: ExitsToday prevents re-entry. Settlement exit at 13:00. Percentage profit target.
notable_techniques: Triple-timeframe high (recent, mid, long). Rising lows + not rising highs = accumulation. Percentage-of-entry profit target.

notable_techniques: AM session OHLC via Amhighd_TX/Amlowd_TX. Majority filter countif(H>HH,k)/k. CDP from AM session. Special settlement date exceptions.

entry_logic: 3-gate CDP. mid=(H+L+C)/3; up=2*mid-L; down=2*mid-H. STL=(H-L)*0.382. Long if C>up AND (open+C)/2>=max(prev_close,mid). Entry at (dayHigh+Highest(H,2))/2 stop. Window bars 5-22.

notable_techniques: 3-gate CDP levels. (open+C)/2 centroid filter. Time-decay trail: progressively tighter as day advances. 38.2% Fibonacci stop.

exit_logic: PFT*1.5 if prior trade profitable. SL*0.9 if prior losing. Trailing at EntryH past PFT, trail at 80% of run. 9% circuit breaker vs AmClosed.

entry_logic: C_bar=close-close[1] momentum. Long if 3 consecutive C_bars>0 AND (OO*2+OC)/3>prev_close AND close>prev_close AND majority k bars bullish. Stp=min(100,Ratio*max_3bar_delta). Max 1 per direction/day.
exit_logic: SL: midpoint entry+EntryH vs Stp. PT: EntryH-entry>Pft trail at (EntryH*2+entry)/3. PT2: >2*Pft accelerated trail. Session end exit.

notable_techniques: C_bar raw momentum: consecutive directional closes. OO/OC first-bar tracking. 2/3-weighted trailing grows with profit.

entry_logic: 3-bar AM candle patterns. 3 red=short. Entry at max of 2-day highs. maxpt=max|close-open| past jump days as volatility check. avgdis capped at sl-2sl range.
exit_logic: After 2+ days adverse + negative PnL: trail dayLow[1]. win_pts>sl*(1 or 2 if 5+ days). 2+ days adverse + high vol: market exit.

notable_techniques: jump-day max |O-C| as volatility regime. AM session candle patterns. Days-held adaptive exit. 3% limit as gap protection.

entry_logic: Symmetric triangle breakout. condition99: Avg(H,Len*2)>Avg(H,Len) AND Avg(L,Len*2)<Avg(L,Len). Buy+sell simultaneously at highest/lowest LenK bars. Max 2/day, non-settlement.
exit_logic: Triangle exit: price touches opposite side. Hard stop=entryprice-STP (Len-bar HL range). Settlement early exit.
risk_management: Dual MA divergence detects triangle. Hard stop auto-sized from HL range. OCO-style simultaneous entries.
notable_techniques: Triangle: outer MA expands, inner contracts. OCO simultaneous long+short. STP from recent volatility.

entry_logic: Box inflection breakout. Find bar near box midpoint, inflection check. If bottom inflection: buy above highest(price_buy, box_len/2). Variance expansion condition: var_sum_fast>var_sum_slow.
exit_logic: Hard stop=stoploss_point. Trailing: _opp>power(barssinceentry,giveback_bar/2). Time limit: >100 bars + low PnL vs avg last 2 trades.
risk_management: Settlement avoidance via _is_settle_day (3rd-Wednesday algo). Variance expansion as trend quality.
notable_techniques: Custom settlement detection. Variance fast/slow ratio as momentum. power(barssinceentry,giveback_bar/2) accelerating giveback threshold.

entry_logic: Gap + MA mean reversion. Long if gap-up AND close retraces >=44% of gap AND close<day_MA AND MA_fast>MA_slow. Short mirror.
exit_logic: Long + later gap down: sell at L. Short + later gap up: cover at H. Settlement setexitonclose.
risk_management: _is_settle_day exit. Only gap-fill in trend direction. MA trend filter prevents counter-trend gap fade.
notable_techniques: Gap fill ratio: 44% retrace. MA trend for gap fade. Symmetric exit: reverse gap = exit. Minimal 3-parameter core.

entry_logic: Identical to GapMA variant. Gap fill with MA trend. Minor: simpler settlement function without hardcoded exception dates.
risk_management: Same core. Shows iterative development with cleaner implementation.
notable_techniques: Iterative strategy development. JumpGap vs Gap variant. Difference only in settlement function. Same 3-parameter WF core.

entry_logic: VCP + range breakout. Variance across box_len bars. var_sum_fast>var_sum_slow = expanding. Entry: close>box_high or <box_low (box widens by stoploss_adj if last exit was stop-loss).
exit_logic: _mpp<thold: hard stop at entry-stoploss. _mpp>=thold: trailing = entry+mpp-avg(H-L,hour_kbar)/sqrt(barssinceentry). Time limit at k_to_stop bars.
risk_management: Dual session closes (ADA/ADP). sqrt(barssinceentry) normalizes trailing. Settlement via _is_settle_day.
notable_techniques: VCP = variance expansion. sqrt(barssinceentry) time-normalized trailing. Prior SL exit widens box. Dual session close functions.

entry_logic: AccumSwingIndex (ASI) crossover MA(Len=105). Long: ASI crosses above Avg(ASI,Len). Extreme limit entry (Guava) at 7% below midpoint. Max 2/day, non-settlement. Rolling 20-session AvgGap array.
exit_logic: Entry stop: Low-2*ATR(13). <2 days: hard stop. >2 days: negative gap check with AvgDRange trail. win>2*AvgDRange first 2 days: early exit.
risk_management: 20-session rolling arrays for AvgGap/AvgDRange. ASI vs MA directional bias.
notable_techniques: AccumSwingIndex: more stable than price MA crossover. 7% limit Guava entry at extremes. AvgDRange adaptive stop. Array-based rolling daily stats.

entry_logic: Symmetric triangle V2 (Maximal Edition). 4-parameter version: LenK=entry breakout, LenS=short avg, LenL=long avg, LenSTP=stop range. condition99: Avg(H,LenL)>Avg(H,LenS) AND Avg(L,LenL)<Avg(L,LenS). Long/short simultaneously at LenK-bar high/low. Max 2/day, non-settlement.
exit_logic: Triangle exit on opposite side touch. STP=highest(H,LenSTP)-lowest(L,LenSTP). Hard stop at entry-STP. Settlement early exit.
risk_management: LenSTP separate from LenK for stop sizing. 4-param WF more flexible than V1. OCO simultaneous entries.
notable_techniques: Maximal Edition: LenSTP parameter separates stop calculation from entry lookback. Better WF flexibility with 4 independent parameters vs 2.

entry_logic: Camarilla pivot system. HL=avg(2-day range). Pivots centered at (prev_close+today_open)/2. RT1-RT4 and SP1-SP4 at HL/4, HL/3, HL/2, HL multiples. Entry: long if close>0.5*(RT3+RT4). Counter-trend: if close crosses under SP3, buy at SP2 stop. Entry window: 09:00 to first 50% of session.
exit_logic: B1 (trend) SL=stl; if win>full_range: market exit. B2 (counter) if price reaches RT4: exit. Time-based: if >12:30 AND highestbar(c,5)>0: sell. Named entry tracking for differentiated exits.
risk_management: STL=max(0.25*(RT4-SP4), 30): dynamic from range. 1 entry/day only. Session first 50% constraint.
notable_techniques: Camarilla: range/4, /3, /2, /1 creates 8 levels around pivot. Counter-trend B2 entry at SP2 when crossing SP3. Time+highestbar combined for adaptive exit timing.

entry_logic: Early ORB with 3 entry modes. ORB established at bar=in (6th bar). value11=ORB_high-H (distance from high). B1: value11 shrinking (approaching high) AND gap-up open AND ORB range>5*in. B2: counter-trend vs ORB lower band. B3: extreme gap (open<prev_close-200). Entry window adaptive: in to in+12 bars normally, in to in+24 bars if avg recent profit negative.
exit_logic: B1: if highestbar stalls (>0.5*len), reverse short from highest. If 3-day range compressed AND price drops from entry: sell-short. Persistence exit: barssinceentry>5*in AND 100% last n bars below entry. B3 gap entry: trailing from entry.
risk_management: profit[] rolling array for performance tracking. AverageArray(profit,n)<0 doubles entry window. highw(0)=weekly high check to limit risk on weekly extremes.
notable_techniques: Entry window doubles when recent trades losing. value11 distance metric as ORB approach detector. Named-entry specific exits (B1/B2/B3 different logic). Weekly high detection for risk reduction.

entry_logic: Weekly cost line pivot. Pivot=(highW(0)+lowW(0))/2 (weekly midpoint). B1: close>weekly_mid*1.01 (above 1%). B2: close<weekly_mid*0.93 (extreme low 7%). S1/S2 mirrors. Entry window: 09:00, before notin bars, no prior entries today. Full-time (includes night session).
exit_logic: Day2+: hard SL=100pts. win>0.5*weekly_range (day1) or entryprice*ratio (day2+): market exit. Night session: exits vs ADP session high/low with STL and AmClosed_TX AM range stop.
risk_management: L_Daytradetime/S_Daytradetime/Daytradetime session counters. No entry if any trade made today. Night session stops via ADP functions.
notable_techniques: Weekly midpoint (highW+lowW)/2 as cost line. 1% proximity and 7% extreme as dual entry zones. Night session managed via ADP session functions. Weekly range as day1 profit target.

name: dayatr3
category: volatility
summary: Day ATR over N days using expanded 4-way TR formula. Iterates daily bars computing maxlist of 4 high-low combinations, then averages. Used for position sizing normalization by daily volatility.

logic.formula: ATRSum = sum of maxlist(H[i]-L[i], H[i+1]-L[i+1], H[i+1]-L[i], H[i]-L[i+1]) for i=1..Length

insight: Expanded 4-way true range picks widest possible daily span including cross-day overlaps — more conservative than standard 3-way ATR.

name: LSEScore
category: fitness_metric
summary: Custom strategy fitness: (EquityRatio) * sqrt(Trades/30) * (TotalMFE^2)/(TotalMAE * MaxMAE * Trades). Combines equity/drawdown ratio, trade count normalization, and MFE/MAE quality score.

logic.mfe_mae_ratio: avg squared MFE over (avg MAE * worst MaxMAE)

insight: MaxMAE in denominator penalizes catastrophic adverse excursions even with good avg MFE. SetCustomFitnessValue enables optimizer integration.

Two base signals: PriceMoveA (futures vs cash spread direction) and PriceMoveB (open-gap continuation). 9 filter modes including dividend adjustment Jun-Aug, trend alignment EMA8/21, high/low breakout, MACD and ADX confirmation. name: dayatr3
summary: Custom Day ATR function. Loops over Length days, computes True Range as max of 4 combinations of high/low across consecutive days, returns average. More robust than standard ATR: uses 4-way max (H-L), (H[1]-L[1]), (H[1]-L), (H-L[1]) across consecutive day pairs. Useful for day-level volatility normalization.

name: LSEScore
summary: Custom fitness/optimization scoring function. Formula: (OpenEquity / AvgDrawdown) * sqrt(Trades/30) * (TotalMFE^2) / (TotalMAE * MaxMAE * TotalTrades). Balances return vs drawdown vs MAE/MFE efficiency. Normalizes by trade count (sqrt factor vs 30 trades baseline). MaxMAE penalizes worst-case adverse excursion. Requires daily ATR normalization of MFE/MAE via GetDayATR(5). Companion helpers: CloseS1/HighS1/LowS1 (session OHLC lookback), OHLCPeriodsAgoS (circular buffer), GetDayATR.

name: _MagicADLuckyNet
summary: Advanced MagicLuckyNet. Dual-signal: PriceMoveA = future vs index spread direction; PriceMoveB = open-gap continuation. Filters 1-9 progressively add: dividend adjustment (Jun-Sep, DivAdjust by EA ratio for FITX/FITE/FITF), trend filter (MA8/MA21), prevDay H/L breakout confirmation, MACD, ADX>30. Night session: if 70% of intraday bars agree on direction carry as NightMove. Daytime (0845-1345) uses PriceMove, outside uses NightMove. CheckPeriod covers hardcoded high-volatility date ranges (2015-2019).

name: _MagicLuckyNet
summary: Base MagicLuckyNet. Two core signals: PriceMoveA (futures close vs index close - future cheaper than index yields long bias=1); PriceMoveB (gap continuation: close>open and open>prevClose = bullish). Filters 1-9 add dividend adj for Jun-Sep (30/40/50 pts), trend filter via MA8/MA21, prevDay H/L breakout, MACD(12,26), ADX(12)>30. Symbol detection auto-scales DivAdjust by EA multiplier (FITE=24.5, FITF=9.15). Returns +1/0/-1 direction signal.

name: QQ
summary: Hardcoded date-lookup table for Taiwan futures options time-value (2007-2020). Values represent daily option time premium remaining before settlement. Counts down from ~100-250 at cycle start to 0 at settlement day, then resets. Each monthly cycle starts high post-settlement and decays to 0. Used as extrinsic value / theta reference. Settlement resets occur mid-month (3rd Wednesday, Taiwan futures rules).

name: _Settlement
summary: Boolean function returning true on Taiwan futures settlement day. Primary rule: day 15-21, Wednesday (DayOfWeek=3). Fallback: if no Wednesday in that range, accepts Thu-Tue progressively (days 16-22+). Uses value1 as monthly flag to prevent double-trigger. Resets each new month. Core utility referenced by many strategies for settlement-day position management.

name: SFoder
summary: Price tick rounding function. Applies Taiwan stock market tick size rules: 10-50 = 0.05 tick, 50-100 = 0.10 tick, 100-500 = 0.50 tick, 500-1000 = 1.0 tick, 1000+ = 5.0 tick. Uses mod() with midpoint rounding (rounds up if remainder > half-tick). Returns rounded price matching exchange minimum tick increments.

name: _Today_Is_Settle_Day
summary: Robust settlement day detection. Tracks LastSettleDay via persistent state. Detects: primary = Wed day 15-21; fallback = consecutive weekdays (Thu day 16+, Fri 17+, Sat 18+, Sun/Mon 19-20+, Tue 21+, Wed 22+) only if current month differs from LastSettleDay month. Returns boolean True/False.

Returns +1/0/-1. Base building block for MagicNet family. Intraday uses live close; overnight uses CloseD(1) comparison.

name: DonchianChannel
summary: Standard Donchian Channel indicator. Plots Highest(base, Length) as upper band, Lowest(base, Length) as lower band, optional midline average. Default length=13, base=close. Used for breakout detection and trend-following entries.

name: Hurst_Exponent
summary: Hurst Exponent indicator via R/S (rescaled range) method over Len bars. Mean-centers prices, builds cumulative sum series, tracks range (MaxY-MinY) and std deviation. H = log(R/(k*S)) / log(Len) where k=1.253314. H>0.5 = trending/persistent, H<0.5 = mean-reverting, H=0.5 = random. Reference line at 0.5 plotted. Used for regime detection before applying trend vs mean-reversion strategy.

name: freeman_daytrade_cost_line
summary: Intraday session range analysis indicator. Tracks session H/L, plots cost_line = (sessionH+sessionL)/2. Maintains rolling 20-session range array, classifies as small (<avg) or large (>=avg). Plots 5 target levels from session low (long targets: min/small/avg/large/max range) and 5 from session high (short targets). Resets at session start (modes: 0=0845, 1=0500, 2=both). Used for intraday mean-reversion target placement.

name: ShowDayMID
summary: Prior-day pivot midpoint indicator. Formula: (HighD(1) + LowD(1) + CloseD(1)*2) / 4. Updates once per day at bar open. Weighted toward close (double weight). Used as intraday support/resistance reference.

name: ShowDayMID_dup2
summary: Duplicate of Mid.md pivot indicator. See Mid.md.

name: OrderMaster
summary: Multi-signal position aggregator and order router. Reads up to 30 named global variables (GV) keyed by filename+number, sums them for net position. On settlement day outside 0845-1340 sets position to 0 (flatten). Writes net position + current price to text file via DLL for external order execution. Key architecture: GlobalVariable.dll for inter-chart communication, file-based order bridge to execution system. Settlement helper: LastTradeDay() finds 3rd Wednesday of month.

name: readFile_TEST
summary: Test indicator for ELCollections DLL file-reading utility. Reads up to 4 text files each containing 8 numeric values. Uses ListN_New/ReadFile/Get/Clear pattern from ELCollections_x64.dll. Demonstrates file-based data injection into TradeStation from external processes.

category: Multi-entry complex swing with pivot + anti-trend layers
summary: NV2109005_TX6M_Cindy_LT-original -- TX6M (TXF mini) complex swing strategy. Long entries: B1=(vmp=0 AND vmp[1]<0 same as exitdate) -> stop at (HighD(0)+Highest(H,2))/2; B2=(DS=0 AND C<minlist(CloseD(1),dn) AND not ShortExit) -> stop; B3=(DS=0 AND LowD(0)>up AND c<o) -> stop. Short entries: S1=(EntriesToday<=1 AND condition40) -> stop; S2/S3=(k>in AND not sessionlastbar) anti-trend entries with pyramid. Pivot levels: mid=(HighD(1)+LowD(1)+CloseD(1))/3; up=mid*2-LowD(1); dn=mid*2-HighD(1) (R1/S1 classic pivot). gap=up-dn. k=CountIf(c<c[1],k) bearish bar count. Exit: RL-Run/RS-Run signals; SetExitOnClose. Key insight: 'anti-trend' entries S2/S3 when k>in = counter-trend when too many consecutive down bars; B3 = inside-bar below pivot resistance with bearish candle = reversal setup at pivot.

category: Multi-entry complex swing with pivot + anti-trend layers (base copy)

Pivot: mid=(H1+L1+C1)/3; R1=mid*2-L1; S1=mid*2-H1. Anti-trend entries when consecutive down-bar count k>in threshold. Note: deduped original copy.

category: RSI-based composite score breakout with ATR extension
summary: No22_TX_RSI_7K_DO (7K capital, Day-Only) -- TX RSI composite score breakout. SumScore=Summation(Score,Len); Condition11=RSI(SumScore,Len)>50+Bias; Condition21=RSI(SumScore,Len)<50-Bias. Primary long: Condition31 AND EntriesToday<=1 -> stop at HighD(0)+AvgTrueRange(Len); primary short: -> LowD(0)-ATR(Len). Reversal long (Rev-LE): mp=0 AND Condition11 -> stop at HighD(0). Reversal short (Rev-SE): Condition21 -> LowD(0). Exit: TimeOut at t<1300 and t>=1325; maxpositionprofit trailing; Highest(H,2)/Lowest(L,2) trailing. Date cutoff: date<=1140312 (2014-03-12). Key insight: RSI of a composite Score variable (not raw price) = second-order momentum; ATR extension of daily high/low creates momentum-adjusted breakout levels; date cutoff shows walk-forward boundary.

category: Candle shadow pattern breakout
summary: No25_TXA_CandleShadow_60K_LO -- TXA (mini) candle shadow pattern. LowerShadow=Condition11 AND Condition12: Condition11=(MinList(Open,Close)-Low)>0.5*Range (lower shadow > 50% of range); Condition22=(High-MaxList(Open,Close))>... for upper shadow. UpperHigh=Highest(High,UpperLen); LowerLow=Lowest(Low,LowerLen). Entry: SellCondition AND High>UpperHigh[0] -> market order (both long and short -- note: same condition for both suggests error or complex logic). Date cutoff: date<=1140314. Key insight: candle shadow size vs body = pin bar detection; shadow > 50% of range = strong rejection candle; N-bar high/low for breakout confirmation after shadow.

summary: No28_TX_MA_60K_LO -- TX dual EMA with gap filter. Condition10=XAverage(Close,FastLen)>XAverage(Close,SlowLen) AND Close>Maxlist(CloseD(1),...). Entry: mp=0 AND gap-up (OpenD(0)>CloseD(1)) AND Condition10 -> stop at Highest(High,(FastLen+SlowLen)/2); gap-down -> stop at Lowest(Low,(FastLen+SlowLen)/2). NShares position sizing. Exit: CountIf(c<o,barssinceentry) = count bearish bars since entry -> trailing stop level STPL+countif(...)*factor. Date cutoff: date<=1140414. Key insight: N=(FastLen+SlowLen)/2 for breakout lookback = average of two MA periods; CountIf bearish bars since entry = progressive stop tightening as bars close bearish.

category: Linear regression + 3-day volatility filter with 2*Vol limit exit
summary: No32_TX_LinearRegCurve_60K_LO_S -- TX linear regression curve strategy. r0=LinearRegValue(C,Len,0). ThreeDayVolatility=MaxList(HighD(1..3))-MinList(LowD(1..3)) (3-day range). Condition30=AbsValue(CloseD(0)-OpenD(0))>ThreeDayVolatility*0.618 (today intraday range > 61.8% of 3-day range). Entry: mp=0 AND C>O AND Condition10 -> market or stop at Highest/Lowest(N). Exit: sell LX-2 at entryPrice+2*Vol limit / BuyToCover at entryPrice-2*Vol limit (symmetric 2-volatility target). Date cutoff: date<=1150204. Key insight: 0.618 Fibonacci ratio as threshold for 'significant' intraday move vs 3-day range; LinearRegValue as trend filter; 2*Vol exit = Fibonacci 2x extension target.

category: Fisher-inverse RSI breakout with 300-minute N-bar lookback
summary: No33_TX_RSIInv_30K_LO -- TX RSI+Fisher inverse breakout. value1=(RSI(C,Len1)-50)/10 = normalized RSI centered at 0. value2=WAverage(value1,Len2) = weighted smoothing. FisherInv(value2) = inverse Fisher transform of smoothed RSI. CountIf(FisherInv(value2)>0.5,2)=2 = two consecutive bars above 0.5 threshold. Entry: -> stop at Highest(H,300/barinterval) / Lowest(L,300/barinterval). N=300/barinterval = dynamic lookback (300 minutes regardless of bar size). STP=MaxList(HighD(1)-LowD(1),FP) as SL. Date cutoff: date<=1150605. Key insight: inverse Fisher transform compresses RSI to (-1,+1) range and sharpens signals at extremes; 300/barinterval = 5-hour lookback in any timeframe; CountIf=2 requires persistence, not single-bar signal.

category: HighestBar recency filter trend entry
summary: No34_TX_TL_17K_LO (TL=Trend Line?, 17K capital) -- TX recency-filtered trend entry. Entry: Condition10 AND HighestBar(High,Len)<=NBar -> market order (both long and short same condition). HighestBar returns how many bars ago the Len-bar high occurred; <=NBar means recent high = recent momentum. SetExitOnClose. Date cutoff: date<=1150114. Key insight: HighestBar(High,Len)<=NBar = 'the N-bar high is recent' = current uptrend has made a new high within last NBar bars; combines trend check (Condition10) with momentum recency.

category: Efficiency ratio entry with reversal at Efficiency extreme
summary: No35_TXA_Efficiency_29K_LO (Efficiency Ratio, 29K capital, TXA mini) -- Entry using Efficiency ratio. Efficiency=Difference/PathValue where Difference=AvgPrice-AvgPrice[Len] (net move); PathValue=Summation(AbsValue(AvgPrice-AvgPrice[1]),Len) (total path). Primary: d>=01170515 -> stop at H-Efficiency*10 long / L+Efficiency*10 short. Reversal (LE_REV): AbsValue(Efficiency-Highest(Efficiency,3))<=(1-NRatio) -> market long when efficiency dropped from recent high; (SE_REV): mp>0 -> market short. Time exit: Calctime(sess1endtime,-2*barinterval). Key insight: Efficiency ratio = directional efficiency of price path (1=straight line, 0=random walk); entry price at H-Efficiency*10 = the higher the efficiency the closer to current price (tighter entry); reversal when Efficiency drops from 3-bar high = momentum decay.

category: Efficiency ratio entry (base copy)

category: TypicalPrice STD breakout with 2-bar CountIf confirmation
summary: No36_TX_STD_60K_LO (STD=Standard Deviation?, 60K capital) -- TX TypicalPrice breakout with var2/var3 bands. var2/var3 likely derived from StdDev of TypicalPrice. Entry: Countif(TypicalPrice>var2,2)=2 AND C>O -> stop at Highest(H,300/barinterval); Countif(TypicalPrice<var3,2)=2 AND C<O -> Lowest(L,300/barinterval). N=300/barinterval dynamic lookback. STP=MaxList(HighD(1)-LowD(1),500*TickSize). Date cutoff: date<=1150204. Key insight: 2-bar CountIf of TypicalPrice above band = requires persistence beyond band for 2 consecutive bars; C>O (bullish close) as additional confirmation; dynamic 300-min N-bar for any timeframe.

summary: No36_TX_STD_60K_LO (base) -- Identical to (2). TypicalPrice 2-bar CountIf above/below var bands; 300/barinterval dynamic breakout. Deduped.

category: Open Interest + gap-open swing filter breakout
summary: a21a21_TXFSF_060_OI01 -- TX 60-min OI-based breakout. OFD = absolute open gap: OpenD(0)-CloseD(1). Condition21: OFD>=nH AND LowD(0)>CloseD(1)-AbsValue(gap) -> up gap, buy at MaxList(HighD(0),HighD(1)) stop. Condition22: OFD>=nL AND HighD(0)<CloseD(1)+AbsValue(gap) -> down gap, buy near low. Condition23: alternate gap condition. Short: swing=1 -> stop at Lowest(l,lenL). Uses FIELD_VOLUME for OI data. Time filter: t>=1330 AND t<=1345. HH=Highest(h,lenH); LL=Lowest(l,lenL) for breakout levels. Key insight: OI + gap direction = institutional positioning; gap opening above prior close with LowD staying positive = confirmed gap-up regime; OI field distinguishes volume (flow) vs open interest (position accumulation).

category: CCI channel breakout with reversal entries at +/-100
summary: OSCAR028_TXALL_CCICHANNEL_LO -- TX CCI channel breakout. VarUp=CCI(CCI_Len); CondL=VarUp>100; CondS=VarDn<-100. Primary: flagM=0 -> stop at Highest(H,NN) long / Lowest(L,NN) short. Reversal: VarUp cross under 100 AND C<O -> Sell short (fade CCI exit from overbought with bearish close). VarDn cross over -100 AND C>O -> Buy (fade CCI exit from oversold with bullish close). Stop: avgEntryPrice +/- win_pts*(1-30/100) = 70% of win_pts as SL. Exit: maxEL/maxES limits; t>1330 AND t<1500 session gate. Key insight: CCI >100 = overbought; CCI crossing back below 100 WITH bearish close = confirmed reversal signal; 70% of win_pts as SL means stop placed at 30% pullback of expected profit.

category: Adaptive ATR with Bollinger band framework and monthly MDD control
summary: OSCAR029_TXALL_ADAPTIVEATR_FLT -- TX adaptive ATR breakout. currentV=AvgTrueRange(ATRn); preV=ATR[1]; deltaV=(currentV-preV)/preV = ATR change rate. buyPoint=Highest(High,BackBars); sellPoint=Lowest(Low,BackBars). BollingerBand(Close,BackBars,iff(MP<>1,BBandL,BBandS)) = dynamic band width by position. SL: entryPrice-(buyPoint-sellPoint)/5 = 20% of channel width. Trailing: Setpercenttrailing(AvgPrice*STL*Bigpointvalue,30). Monthly MDD control var for drawdown limiting. AMOpenD_TX/AMLowD_TX AM session functions. BadJump exit: AMOpenD<AMLowD[1] = AM open below yesterday's AM low. Reversal entries: revS/revB market orders. Key insight: deltaV = ATR acceleration; SL at 1/5 of channel = tight stops inside the channel; BadJump exit uses AM session data to detect unfavorable gap-down opens.

category: Adaptive ATR Bollinger breakout (base copy)
summary: OSCAR029_TXALL_ADAPTIVEATR_FLT (base) -- Identical to (2). ATR acceleration as adaptive filter; channel/5 SL; monthly MDD control; AM session BadJump exit. Deduped.

category: Triple EMA trend with weekly-open breakout and counter-trend reversal
summary: OSCAR030_TX_3MA_LO (30-min TX) -- Triple EMA trend system. FastL/MidL/SlowL = EMA(AvgPrice,MALen) trend flags with cross-over checks. HPoint/LPoint = entry levels. Primary: flagM=0 -> stop at HPoint/LPoint. Reversal long (Rev_L): mp>0 AND EntriesToday=1 AND barssinceentry>(5*60/BarInterval)/2 AND win_pts<0 -> market (scale-in when losing after half-session). Reversal short (Rev_S): (FastS OR SlowS OR MidS) AND MRO(Close>=Open,3,1)>-1 AND C<OpenW(0). OpenW(0) = weekly open reference. SL: SetStopLoss(AvgPrice*STL); PT: PD (fixed points); trailing: 30% of 3*STL. Key insight: C<OpenW(0) = price below weekly open = weekly downtrend; Rev_L when losing after half-session = scale-in at adversity; barssinceentry>(5*60/BarInterval)/2 = position held for half session.

category: Dual MA with AM session midpoint entry and CountIf confirmation
summary: OSCAR032_TXALL_2MA_FDL (30-min, Full Day + Late session) -- Dual SMA with AM session reference. MAL1=Average(High,FastLen); MAL2=Average(High,SlowLen); MAS1/MAS2 on Low. Condition6 = dual MA alignment. Entry: flagM=0 AND mp=0 AND Condition6 AND CountIf(C>O,CI)>CI*0.5 -> stop at (AmHighD_TX(0)+AmCloseD_TX(1))/2 long; (AmLowD_TX(0)+AmCloseD_TX(1))/2 short. AmHighD_TX/AmLowD_TX = AM session functions. CountIf(C>O,CI)>50% = majority of last CI bars are bullish. Trailing: Setpercenttrailing(AvgPrice*STL*2,30). Time filter: T>0900 AND T<1200 OR T>1800 AND T<0500 (includes night session). Key insight: AM session H+prior close / 2 = equilibrium entry between yesterday's sentiment and today's AM range; CountIf majority confirmation prevents premature trend entry; night session inclusion.

category: Dual MA with adaptive trailing and multi-layer SL
summary: OSCAR033_TXALL_2MA_FDL -- TX dual MA with adaptive trailing. MAL1=Average(High,FastLen); MAL2=Average(High,FastLen*2) = 1x/2x ratio. Entry: MP=0 AND flagM=0 AND Condition5 -> stop at Minlist(AmHighD_TX(0),AmHighD_TX(1)) long (lower of today's vs yesterday's AM high = conservative entry). Short: Maxlist(AmLowD_TX(0),AmLowD_TX(1)). Multi-layer SL: SetStopLoss(AvgPrice*STL); fixed at entryPrice-PD*6; additional levels at PD and 5-point tight stop. Adaptive trailing: Setpercenttrailing(AvgPrice*STL*2, 30-BarsSinceEntry/10) = trail percentage TIGHTENS as bars progress. Time filter: T>0915 AND T<1300 OR T>1500 AND T<0500. Key insight: Minlist(AmH(0),AmH(1)) = conservative entry, only entering if today's AM high is below yesterday's; trailing % = 30-BSE/10 means after 100 bars trailing is only 20% = automatic tightening over time.

category: ATR-filtered trend with balance-day exclusion and gap ratio exit
summary: EX421T05 -- Long entry when IsBalanceDay=False AND time in window -> market order via BM01_1. Short when MagicLuckyNet(3)>0 AND XX>=YY AND KB<1 AND ATR<ATRrange -> SM01_1 market. Exit: C/O >= (1+Ratio) bull-bar sell; balance-day LX_Bal. Indicators: Highest/Lowest(300) range filter for position size (Nshares doubled if range<0.025*Close); daily open/high/low/close for FL1/FL2 trend flags. Key insight: position sizing based on 300-bar H-L range as vol proxy; ATR threshold gates short entry; gap-up candle (C/O >= 1+Ratio) triggers immediate exit.

category: MagicLuckyNet breakout with ATR trailing
summary: EX422T05 -- Long: MP<>1 AND condition1 AND MagicLuckyNet(FTR_LE)>0 AND Value2<up -> buy stop at Highest(High,BarnoL). Short: same filter -> sell stop at Lowest(Low,BarnoS). Exit: LX_Bal/SX_Bal at 1315. ATR trailing: AvgTrueRange(ATRlength)*TrailingATRs used as trailing distance when High>EntryPrice. Indicators: Highest/Lowest range of BarnoL and BarnoS bars for channel. Key insight: uses two separate bar-length parameters for long vs short channel width - asymmetric breakout levels allow independent tuning of long/short sensitivity.

category: ADX-filtered ATR-channel breakout with prior close anchor
summary: EX424T25 -- Long: MagicLuckyNet(FTR_LE)>0 AND VarL1<=XL1 -> buy stop at UBuy = CloseD(1)+Frac_LE*ATRL. Short: same filter -> sell stop at USell = CloseD(1)-Frac_SE*ATRS. VarL1 = (CloseD(1)-LowD(1))/(HighD(1)-LowD(1)) = yesterday position within daily range. ADX(NL1) trend strength filter. VarS2 = spread between data2 and data1 closes (multi-instrument). Key insight: entry price anchored at prior close +/- ATR fraction; position-within-range filter (VarL1<=XL1) means only enter when yesterday closed in lower portion of its range for longs - a value-zone entry concept.

category: EMA trend + CountIf MA cross reversal with dual entry types
summary: EX4401T30 -- Dual entry: (1) C<=O -> HP stop buy at HighPoint; C>=O -> LP stop sell at LowPoint. (2) Reversal: MP>0 AND MagicLuckyNet(FTR_SE)<0 -> buy stop at Highest(High,NBarL); MultiTrend conditions (FastTrendS/SlowTrendS/MedTrendS) AND MRO(C>=O,3,1)>-1 -> sell stop at Lowest(Low,NBarS). EMA trend: XAverage(AvgPrice,BaseLenA) slope. CountIf exit: Countif(Close cross under MA(20),2)>=1 -> sell at Low-ATR(20). SetStopLoss(PL*BigPointValue). Key insight: candlestick color (C vs O) selects HighPoint vs LowPoint entry level; CountIf MA cross detection for exit is smoother than single-bar cross.

category: Dual SMA channel trend with percent stop
summary: EX4402T24 -- Long/Short: MP<>1 AND MagicLuckyNet(FTR_LE)>0 AND Condition1 AND Condition3 -> market. MA structure: AvgL1=Average(High,FastL), AvgL2=Average(High,SlowL), AvgS1/AvgS2 on Low. SetStopLoss(PL*BigPointValue). PF=AvgPrice*TradeProfit; PL=AvgPrice*TradeStopLoss -> percent-based SL/PT relative to entry price. Key insight: using High for long MA and Low for short MA creates natural channel bands rather than using Close for both - tighter channel for longs, wider for shorts.

category: ADX momentum channel breakout with range filter
summary: EX442T45 -- Long: MRO(EntrySetUp,Ch,1)<>-1 AND HLRange>ChannelBand -> buy stop at UpCh = AvgPrice+ATR(RangeLength)/2. Short: same -> sell stop at DnCh = AvgPrice-ATR(RangeLength)/2. HLRange = Highest(High,HLBar)-Lowest(Low,HLBar). TrueRange<=Highest(Range,HLBar)[1] as additional gate (compressed range entry). ADX(ADXLen) for trend strength; DeltaADX = ADX change; DeltaAvg = WAverage of DeltaADX. SetStopLoss(PL*BigPointValue). Key insight: UpCh/DnCh centered on AvgPrice (OHLC/4) +/- half-ATR creates symmetric channel; HLRange>ChannelBand ensures sufficient range before entry.

category: EntryType-switched breakout with TypicalPrice and settlement filter
summary: EX514T30 -- EntryType=5 gate for both directions: buy stop at Value2 (Highest(High,NBarS)); sell stop at Value3 (Lowest(Low,NBarL)). IsSettlementDay check present. PriceType switch: TypicalPrice / AvgPrice / other. Time filter: time>=1315 for exit; DayOfWeek filter for entry gating. Exit: LX_Bal/SX_Bal. Key insight: EntryType parameter allows switching between multiple entry logic branches; PriceType parameter enables flexible price source selection for indicator calculation.

category: KVO volume-force oscillator breakout with swing detection
summary: EX541T30 -- Long: MagicLuckyNet(FTR_LE)>0 AND KVOX>SignalX -> buy stop at Highest(High,HighBar) or market. Short: same -> sell stop at Lowest(Low,LowBar) or market. KVOX = Summation(KOFastX-KOSlowX, SmoothX) where KOFastX=XAverage(VForce,FastX). VForce = Volume*Ticks*Value1*Trend. Trend based on TypicalPrice direction. CM = cumulative DM (Range) reset on trend change -> Klinger-style volume force. SwingHigh(1,High,5,30) detection for additional exit. SetStopLoss+SetProfitTarget. Key insight: KVO (Klinger Volume Oscillator) uses volume*range*trend direction for force; KVOX>SignalX = KVO crossover signal; swing high detection layered on top for position management.

category: ADX channel breakout with MedianPrice center (60m)
summary: EXBZ01T60 -- Long: MRO(EntrySetUp,Ch,1)<>-1 AND HLRange>ChannelBand AND TrueRange<=Highest(Range,HLBar)[1] -> buy stop at UpCh = MedianPrice+ATR(RangeLength)/2. Short: same conditions + RevS at Lowest(Low,NBarS). UpCh/DnCh centered on MedianPrice. ADX slope (DeltaADX) for momentum. HLRange filter. SetStopLoss(PL*BigPointValue). Key insight: MedianPrice=(H+L)/2 vs AvgPrice=(O+H+L+C)/4 as channel center - MedianPrice ignores open/close noise, purely structural; 60m timeframe suggests swing-like holding.

category: Retracement limit order after range expansion
summary: EXBZ02T21 -- Long: Highest(High,RangeBar_L)-Lowest(Low,RangeBar_L)>LongRange AND MP<>1 AND Price>=LowPrice*RetraceFctrDn AND MagicLuckyNet>0 AND Price<LowPrice -> limit buy at Highest(High,BarLong). Short: range expansion>ShortRange AND Price<=HighPrice*RetraceFctrDn -> limit sell at Lowest(Low,BarShort). RetracePctL=0.34, RetracePctS=0.32. SetStopLoss(PL); SetProfitTarget(PF). Key insight: waits for range expansion THEN enters on retracement (limit order) rather than breakout (stop order) - counter-trend entry within trending context; RetracePct ~34% retracement filter prevents chasing.

category: False breakout EMA reversal (duplicate)
summary: c3057_TX_FalseBK2_LO (copy 2) -- Identical to FalseBK2.md. MP=0 entry only. Long condition1: Low<Lowest(L,Len)[1] AND C>XAverage(C,Len) = false breakdown (price dips below prior range low but closes above EMA -> reversal long). Short condition2: High>Highest(H,Len*2)[1] AND C<XAverage(C,Len) = false breakout (price pokes above double-period high but closes below EMA -> reversal short). Entry: stop at Highest(H,2) long / Lowest(L,2*2) short. Key insight: FalseBK concept - false breakout ID using EMA as trend filter; 2x period high for short (wider range = harder to break = more significant false breakout signal). Deduped.

category: False breakout EMA reversal (base)
summary: c3057_TX_FalseBK2_LO -- False breakout reversal. condition1=Low<Lowest(L,Len)[1] AND C>EMA(C,Len); condition2=High>Highest(H,Len*2)[1] AND C<EMA. Long entry: stop at Highest(H,2); Short entry: stop at Lowest(L,2*2). SetExitOnClose. Core logic: classic false breakout - price temporarily violates a key level but price action (close relative to EMA) reveals the breakout has failed. 2x Len period for short high-breakout = two cycle high creates stronger resistance.

category: Complex multi-contract position management example
summary: testMP (forexample.md) -- Complex template: mrEntryCount<MaxPosEntry AND isClosingTime=false -> market long/short. change_check<0 -> market short. Exit: sell/buytocover Absvalue(change_check) contracts at market. Tracks mrEntryCount for position scaling. isClosingTime flag for session end management. Time filter 1330-1501 (Taiwan intraday). High complexity flag - manual review needed. Key insight: change_check variable drives both entry direction and exit size (Absvalue) - likely a delta or momentum signal that doubles as position-sizing input.

category: MA gap open entry with Fibonacci-extended daily targets
summary: G003_TX_LT_3Prices -- Long: mp=0 AND exitdate(1)<>D AND LastTradeDay(D)<>D AND OpenD(0)+enterBuffer<MA(Close,5) -> market. Short: OpenD(0)-enterBuffer>MA. Entry blocked on last trade day and day after exit. Targets: HL=(HighD(1)+LowD(1))*1.382+LowD(1) = Fibonacci extension of prior day range. Three price levels from prior H/L/Mid used as SL and PT. Key insight: 1.382 = golden ratio extension; three-price system creates profit zone with partial exits; exitdate(1)<>D prevents re-entry same day after stop-out; gap-open filter (open vs MA) selects favorable opening tone.

category: Gap-fill breakout with session open high/low stops
summary: Gapless -- Long: not afterSettThurs AND mp=0 AND ExitsToday(d)<>1 AND not condition5 -> stop at highd(0). Short: same -> stop at lowd(0). Gap = c-closeD(1) at sess1firstbartime; gl=c+(gap/3...) = gapless reference level. condition1/21: price vs (H+L+C)/3 of prior day (pivot). Exit: Highest(h,3)/lowd[1.03/0.97] trailing. Key insight: gapless concept = track gap-fill level if market opens with gap; condition5 likely flags full gap fill; ExitsToday<>1 prevents re-entry after first stop; afterSettThurs guard avoids settlement Thursday volatility.

category: Settlement day bracket entry with bar-count condition
summary: _Gift -- Long: CountA<>0 -> stop Buy at High-2*minmove/priceScale (near high). Settlement day: Buy2 at Close+PL+minmove/PriceScale. Short: (BarsSinceEntry>NBar OR MP=0) AND (Close-Open)>BinGo -> stop Sell at Low. Settlement day Sell2 at Close-PF-minmove/PriceScale. Key insight: CountA is an external accumulation counter; BinGo = minimum body size for short entry (large bar condition); settlement day uses fixed bracket entries offset from close; minmove/PriceScale = tick size for precise order placement.

category: StdDev-filtered MA breakout with ATR range normalization
summary: a40GS000_TXFLF_060 -- Long c_le / Short c_se -> stop at p_le/p_se. Condition includes StdDev(c,lenL)<StdDev(c,lenL*2) AND c>Average(c,lenL) = price above MA with decreasing short-term vol vs longer-term (vol compression setup). ATR normalized: atrRL = average((Highest(h,len)-Lowest(l,len))/o[len], len) = percentage range. AMDTL/PMDTL (AM/PM daily time limit) conditions for session-specific exits. calctime(sess1endtime/-barinterval) for precise session boundaries. Key insight: StdDev(short)<StdDev(long) = volatility squeeze = Bollinger squeeze equivalent; normalized ATR (divided by open price) enables cross-price-level comparison.

category: KC-adjusted close vs MA with CountIf persistence (dup2)
summary: H053_TX_SM_LO_30M (copy 2) -- KC = close - OpenD(0) (gap-adjusted close = KC oscillator). value3 = Average(KC,len). Long: mp<=0 AND closeD(1)<value3 AND CountIf(kc<value3,nK)>=nK-1 AND c>value3 AND KC>LowD(1) -> stop Highest(h,2). Short: inverse. CountIf(kc<value3,nK)>=nK-1 = at least nK-1 of last nK bars KC below average = persistent bearish KC. KC>LowD(1) = today KC gap positive. Key insight: KC = close minus today open = intraday momentum from open; CountIf persistence filter prevents false breakouts. Deduped x4.

key_logic: TXN 5m D2: d2 second derivative with adaptive smoothing. Entry when d1[1]<0 and CountIf(l>l[1],3)>=2 (2+ of 3 bars higher lows in downtrend). flagM prevents re-entry. Stop adjusts by (o-c)/2 per bearish close bar. Dual session support.

entry_short: condition1 AND condition2 AND narrow candle -> SE1; closeada>openada AND highada>highada[1] -> SE2 counter-trend
key_logic: 1m Last bar adaptive: condition2=d2 inflection below average (second derivative sign-change AND magnitude<average). BE1 narrow adaptive candle; BE2 wide candle breakout. SE2 counter-trend on adaptive upbar+new high. Stop cumulatively reduced by bearish bar body size.

entry_long: kday<>0 AND sum_a(NH,20)=0 AND k in [10,20] AND mp=0 AND y+z<2 -> stop at maxlist(lowd(0)+avgdis/5,highest(l,3))

key_logic: 6m Counter-trend swing: only in consolidation (NH=0). Entry in middle k [10,20]. Long: (highd*2+highd[1])/3>closeD[1] AND highd-avgdis<opend AND CountIf(l>lowd,k)>=k/2. Stop base avgdis/3; trailing reduces by bearish bar count.

key_logic: 5m Price Distribution: secondary data2 for daily H/L (hd2,ld2). NH splits conditions: highd(0)>=avg(pd) and lowest(l,len*2)>ld2. Exit when price returns to daily low band AND new high of data2. Avg price displacement (pd) as range measure.

entry_long: d2*d2[1]<=0 -> market
key_logic: Daily RSRate swing: RS_Rate=absvalue(EMA(CUP)-EMA(Cdwn))/(EMA(CUP)+EMA(Cdwn)). Entry on d2 sign change (second derivative inflection). Long confirmed by CountIf(rate>rate[1],2)>=2 (rate accelerating). CUP/Cdwn=up/down close components. Normalized EMA-based relative strength ratio.

summary: Core MAE/MFE calculation library. get_mae computes Maximum Adverse Excursion (worst drawdown from entry). get_mfe computes Maximum Favorable Excursion (best profit potential). mae_mfe_pair batches both with mae_first flag: True=MFE window is entry to MAE_time, False=full trade. Supports OHLC DataFrame, Series, numpy array, list.
MAE/MFE scatter plot: |MAE| on x-axis vs MFE on y-axis. x=y diagonal line: points above = MFE > |MAE| = good entry. Points below = adverse excursion dominates.
Tick-level MAE/MFE. Entry uses ask_price, MAE uses bid_low minus 1-tick cost. MFE computed only to MAE time. Bid-ask volume diff: (vol_diff-mean)/std * sqrt(300) rolling 300s, filtered 8-14h.

Full MAE/MFE pipeline on YM Dow futures daily. RSV(10) signal. ae_long/fe_long per-trade excursion series. mfe_strict (up to MAE time) vs mfe_loose (full trade). MAE grouped in 25pt bins: pnl_curve win/lose by MAE bucket to find optimal stop. ATR-normalized MAE. Most complete implementation in library.

Portfolio-level metrics complementing trade-level MAE/MFE. Sharpe=sqrt(252)*mean(excess)/std, rf=4%/252. MaxDD=(price/rolling_max).min()-1. Drawdown details: start/end/duration/depth DataFrame. indicators() returns (Sharpe, MaxDD, MaxDDD, FinalReturn).

5 strategy templates: Breakout(20d high/10d low Donchian), BBand(5MA cross lower 1.5SD/below midband), WMSR(<80/>20), BIAS(<-3%/>3.5% from 6d MA), MACD(DIF crossover). Use with pymafe for MAE/MFE analysis.
MT5 live position tracker. Polls mt5.positions_get() every 10s, appends open_price/trade_id/tag/magic/pnl/datetime to records.csv. Foundation for real-time MAE/MFE monitoring of live positions.

Draft 5-min TAIEX ATR signal. Entry when (close-open)/ATR < -0.75 (oversold body). Time filter: 09:00-13:40, 15:15-21:25, 21:45-04:55. Shows LE/LX/SE/SX/LXSE/SXLE position labeling pattern. Partial draft with syntax errors - use as pattern reference only.

Batch backtest runner. Loads stock data from pickle, iterates all functions from strategies module, computes Sharpe/MaxDD/MaxDDD/FinalReturn/days/entries per symbol x strategy. DataFrame sortable by any metric. Reference architecture for systematic strategy evaluation.

title: 台指期回測框架規格 + Edward交易模式
key_concepts: Python自建回測引擎（非backtrader/zipline），完全控制MAE/MFE計算
IS/OOS淘汰標準：MDD_OOS/MDD_IS>2.0x淘汰，Sharpe_OOS/Sharpe_IS<0.5淘汰，勝率方向翻轉直接淘汰
模組設計：data/loader → strategy/base → engine/runner → metrics/stats+oos → report/summary
Edward交易四階段：市場分類器→順勢+避險→逆勢回歸→選擇權→跨市場
理想權益曲線=階梯狀（下跌空手，上漲滿倉）
數據來源：Yahoo Finance日K（免費驗證），嘉實/精誠分K（上線用）
summary: 台指期策略回測系統設計規格。Python自建引擎，重點在IS/OOS淘汰標準（MDD比>2x或Sharpe比<0.5即淘汰）。Edward四階段交易模式：市場分類→順勢避險→逆勢→選擇權→跨市場，長期目標覆蓋agent運行成本。

title: FI財務獨立模型模板
key_concepts: FI核心參數：月收入I、每日消費c、名目年報酬r、通膨i、初始資產W0
FI閾值W*：投資組合大到足以由報酬支應所有消費
可行條件：r>i 且 收入>支出
月支出M=c*30.4375，月儲蓄S=I-M，實質報酬rho=(r-i)/(1+i)
summary: FI財務獨立計算模板。輸入月收入、每日消費、報酬率、通膨率及初始資產，計算達到FI所需月數及FI門檻。可行條件：實質報酬>0且收入>支出。

source_file: E:/投資交易/研究與模型/財神爺框架.md
title: 財神爺框架：用戶瀏覽數據預測股價
key_concepts: 核心假設：鉅亨網用戶瀏覽行為領先股價（瀏覽量↑成交量↑股價）
假設可測試：特定個股當日被大量瀏覽→隔日均價漲幅？
特徵工程：用戶ID+日期+股票代碼+停留時間→隔日均價漲跌幅
模型架構：歷史資料→訓練預測模型（今日走勢+隔日走勢）→即時資料→模擬操盤
今日走勢=(收盤-開盤)/開盤；隔日均價漲跌幅=(明日均價-今日收盤)/今日收盤
summary: 另類數據應用案例。以鉅亨網用戶瀏覽數據為特徵，預測個股隔日走勢。核心假設：股價大跌→瀏覽量增加；瀏覽量與成交量正相關。建立今日走勢模型+隔日走勢模型進行模擬操盤。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/MAFE 基本五步驟流程.md
title: MAE/MFE分析五步驟流程
key_concepts: A. 觀察策略波動穩定性：MAE/MFE時序圖，判斷是否需分段分析
B. 判斷是否需延遲進場：右上角MAE高MFE低→延遲進場；參考MAE Q1~(Q1+Q2)/2
C. 停損停利設定：波段交易看MAE對MFEbeforeMAE圖；趨勢交易看MAE對MFE圖；SL/TP會消耗勝率
D. 移動停損：觀察MHL；損益兩平觸發點設在敗手MFE (Q1+Q2)/2~Q2
E. 加減碼：高勝率→不利方向加碼在WinMAE Q1~Q2；MFE高→有利方向加碼在WinMFE Q2~Q3
原則：法則非唯一，需依策略特性調整
summary: MAE/MFE分析實用五步驟：穩定性觀察→延遲進場判斷→SL/TP設定→移動停損→加減碼機制。每步驟有具體的分布圖觀察方法和分位數參考值。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/MAFE 最大幅度分析法.md
title: MAE/MFE最大幅度分析法基礎
key_concepts: MAE=Max Adverse Excursion=持倉期間最大不利幅度（含交易成本）；MFE=Max Favorable Excursion
cMFE=全程最大有利幅度；MFE before MAE=MAE之前的最大有利幅度（可用停利）
E-Ratio=MFE/MAE=邊際優勢比；策略體質指標
勝手(winning trade)MAE：無長尾，前段bins叢聚快速遞減；敗手MAE：有長尾，峰值在勝手右側
MAE分布形狀：正偏=策略體質好；負偏=過早進場；多峰=市場波動水準變化
停損選取：找勝手/敗手MAE的切分點，或以資金1%作為bin size
新手應先使MAE變小，才能透過交易績效衡量策略
summary: MAE/MFE分析法基礎定義與應用。重點：MAE決定停損位置（非技術指標），勝手MAE無長尾、敗手MAE有長尾，從分布找最優切點。E-Ratio=MFE/MAE衡量策略優勢。先解決MAE再優化MFE。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/MAFE 進階分析.md
title: MAE/MFE進階分析：ATR標準化、時間維度、多貨幣兌
key_concepts: ATR標準化：MAE/MFE單位改用當下Daily ATR，消除不同波動水準差異
時間維度MAE/MFE：進場N個bar內的MAE vs 之後的MAE（海龜Edge-Ratio）
多組合MAE/MFE：以整組損益計算MAE/MFE，而非單標的價格
反向單層級：MAE→MFEbeforeMAE→MAE before MFEbeforeMAE，越細緻越複雜
進場lot size與SL關係：ATR小時SL縮小→可能增加部位；需平衡穩定損益與工業化風險管理
ML預測迷思：LSTM不優於ARIMA，spectral bias導致只能擬合低頻，overfitting根本是樣本代表性
summary: MAE/MFE進階優化方向：用ATR標準化消除波動差異、加入時間維度edge-ratio、多組合整體計算。ML預測警告：LSTM不優於ARIMA，spectral bias導致只能擬合低頻，overfitting根本是樣本代表性問題。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/A Model of Momentum.md
title: Liu & Zhang 2011 NBER: 動量的投資理論模型
key_concepts: 核心命題：動量利潤可由neoclassical投資理論（非行為偏誤）解釋
機制：Winners有更高expected growth + expected marginal productivity → 更高expected stock returns
模型alpha：winner-minus-loser=0.44%/yr vs CAPM 16.95% vs FF3F 19.15%
比較靜態：expected I/K growth是動量最重要驅動因子；expected sales/capital次之
動量反轉：2年後自然反轉，原因是expected I/K growth低持久性
交叉效應：模型捕捉size、age、volume、volatility與動量的交互作用
模型缺陷：無法複製procyclical動量利潤（景氣好時動量更強）
summary: NBER WP16747。動量利潤可由最優投資理論解釋，無需行為偏誤假設。Winners有更高投資成長率和邊際生產力→更高預期報酬。GMM估計alpha僅0.44%/yr。動量2年後反轉因I/K growth持久性低。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/Mechanics of Futures Markets & Hedging Using Futures.md
title: 期貨市場機制與避險策略
key_concepts: 期貨特性：集中交易、每日結算（marking to market）、標準化合約
保證金機制：原始保證金→每日結算損益→維持保證金→Margin call→變動保證金
交割日：First notice day / Last notice day / Last trading day；多頭需在first notice day前平倉
期貨vs遠期：標準化/每日結算/無信用風險 vs 客製化/到期結算/有信用風險
基差風險(Basis risk)：欲避險標的與期貨標的不同、時間不同、需提前平倉
避險爭論：公司不應替股東避險（股東可自己避）vs 本業公司應鎖定非本業風險
空頭/多頭避險；產業競爭者不避險時，一家避險反而收益不穩定
正常市場(contango)=遠月>近月；反轉市場(backwardation)=近月>遠月（便利收益yield）
TAIFEX在FIA交易量排名第17，台指選擇權排名第13
summary: 期貨市場基礎機制：每日結算、保證金制度、基差風險。避險策略：空頭避險（持現貨賣期貨）/多頭避險（放空現貨買期貨）。正常/反轉市場結構。重要：公司避險必須考慮整個產業生態，否則反效果。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/知識素材/Option Introduction.md
title: 選擇權入門：基本概念與策略
key_concepts: Call Payoff = Max{0, S-K}；Put Payoff = Max{0, K-S}
選擇權價值 = 內含價值(intrinsic value) + 時間價值(time value)
ITM=有內含價值(Call:S>K, Put:K>S)；OTM=無內含價值；ATM=S=K
買方：虧損有限（權利金），獲利無限，希望波動大
賣方：獲利有限（最多收權利金），虧損無限，希望波動小，需繳保證金
BTC選擇權以BTC計價結算，PnL與vanilla option不同（需除以到期標的價格）
參數：標的價格、履約價K、到期時間τ=T-t、權利金c/p
summary: 選擇權基礎。Call=有權買(S-K)^+；Put=有權賣(K-S)^+。買方付權利金換無限獲利潛力；賣方收權利金承擔無限風險。BTC選擇權特殊：以BTC結算，PnL計算需換算。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/交易策略與系統規範.md
title: 交易系統規範：憲法+風控+策略分類+海龜
key_concepts: 三大交易憲法：損失控制（嚴格停損）、部位控制（風險承受度）、情緒控制（失控強制離場）
風險限額：日MDD<=3%總資金；單筆MDD<=1%~1.5%；日最大5筆，50口大台
部位架構：菱形加碼[2,3,3,2]；母單(Trend)30%/趨勢單(Pullback)40%/動能單(Momentum)30%
順勢單賺賠比>=1:3；逆勢單賺賠比1:1.1~1.2（靠高勝率>51%獲利）
海龜系統：N=20日EMA TR；Unit=1%帳戶淨值/(N*Dollar/point)
海龜進場：System1突破20日高點（上次虧損才執行）；System2突破55日高點
海龜加碼：每0.5N加1Unit，最多4Unit；停損2N；出場S1跌破10日低/S2跌破20日低
策略命名：!!Prod/!@Beta/!Dev + 商品_時段_波段當沖_週期_策略名
Walk-Forward Analysis：確保OOS獲利能力；ATR加權資金管理：r*N*ATR+(1-r)*Const
summary: 完整交易系統規範。三法則：損失控制、部位控制、情緒控制。日MDD上限3%，單筆1-1.5%。海龜法則完整實作：ATR定位、20/55日突破進場、0.5N加碼、2N停損、10/20日低出場。WF分析+ATR加權資金管理。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/交易系統完整結構.md
title: 交易系統完整結構：供需失衡框架+ATR+Z-Score+績效診斷
key_concepts: 交易本質：EV=P_w*V_w - P_l*V_l > 0且>總成本(手續費+稅)
供需失衡策略：數據驗證/籌碼清洗（融資維持率<130%）/產業結構/資訊速度差
ATR標準化：ATR_norm=ATR/Close*100，跨標的比較波動
Entropy信號過濾：H=-sum(p_i*log2(p_i))；H>0.7縮倉觀望；H<0.3放大順勢
MAE公式：MAE_i=min(P_t-P_entry)；MFE_i=max(P_t-P_entry)；自適化SL/TP用中位數*ATR_norm
Z-Score策略：Z=(X-mu)/sigma；Z>+2逆勢建空；-2~+2趨勢跟隨；Z<-2逆勢建多
績效診斷：Expectancy>0；Profit Factor 1.5~2.5；Recovery Factor越高越好；Sharpe>1.0
0050風險：台積電>50%，R_tw約等於R_tsmc，不具分散效果
宏觀AI算力：短期Bloom Energy(燃料電池)/中期Oklo(SMR)/長期Helion(核融合)
summary: 完整交易系統架構。EV>0是核心。ATR標準化、Entropy雜訊過濾、Z-Score均值回歸、MAE/MFE自適應停損。四大績效指標健康值。AI算力宏觀布局三階段。0050不等於分散（台積電占比>50%）。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/投資管理與資金控管_筆記.md
title: 資金控管模型：Kelly + VaR + MDD + 預測心法
key_concepts: Kelly公式：f=(b*p-q)/b；b=賠率(Win/Loss)；p=勝率；EV<=0不下注
半凱利(Half-Kelly)：實務使用1/2~1/3 Kelly，降低波動風險
平賭法(Martingale)：絕對不可用，破產風險無限大
反平賭法(Anti-Martingale)：贏加碼輸減碼，符合截斷虧損讓利潤奔跑
金字塔加碼：加碼部位<原始部位，避免頭重腳輕
VaR：95%或99%信心水準下的最大可能損失；無法捕捉肥尾/極端事件
MDD：恢復指數級（跌50%需漲100%回本）
2%法則：單筆風險<=總資金2%；部位股數=總資金*2%/(進場價-停損價)
預測：狐狸(多視角彈性調整)>刺蝟(單一大觀點)；貝氏更新；集體智慧
summary: 資金管理三大工具：Kelly公式（最優複利下注）、VaR（風險量化限制）、2%法則（單筆風險上限）。絕不用Martingale。Anti-Martingale+金字塔加碼符合趨勢交易原則。預測心法：貝氏更新+狐狸多視角。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/資產配置系統.md
title: 資產配置系統：下方風險最小化+核心衛星架構
key_concepts: 目標函數：Maximize U=E[R_p]-lambda*Risk_downside；約束：Real Return>=0，MaxDD<=20~25%，流動性>=6個月生活費
Semi-Deviation=sqrt(sum(min(R_i-MAR,0)^2)/N)；MAR=通膨+2%
資產角色：QQQ(成長)/BTC(凸性放大,sigma>60%)/GLD(回撤吸收)/XLV.XLP(防禦)/USMV.SPLV(波動壓縮)
核心60%：USMV20%/XLV.XLP15%/GLD15%/TLT.IEI10%
衛星40%：QQQ30%/TQQQ5%/BTC5%
四象限通膨矩陣：低通膨高成長→QQQ；高通膨高成長→原物料房地產；低通膨衰退→TLT；高通膨衰退→GLD.TIPS.BTC
全天候：VT30%/TLT35%/IEI15%/GLD7.5%/DBC7.5%/BTC5%
再平衡：每季時間觸發+偏離5%強制觸發
summary: 資產配置系統設計。目標：最小化下方風險，MaxDD上限25%，實質報酬>=0。核心衛星架構：60%防禦(USMV/GLD/債)+40%進攻(QQQ/BTC)。四象限通膨矩陣指導戰術配置。歷史壓力測試均顯著優於純QQQ。

source_file: E:/投資交易/參考書籍/Natenberg_期權波動率與定價_筆記.md
title: Natenberg選擇權波動率與定價：遠期合約定價、結算機制、套利
key_concepts: 遠期合約公式：F=現貨*(1+r*t)+儲存費-便利收益；商品市場contango vs backwardation
股票遠期：F=[S*(1+r*t)]-D（D為預期股息）；可推算implied spot/rate/dividend
基差=現貨-遠期；通常為負（成本>便利收益）；便利收益高時可正
Stock-type settlement（選擇權）vs Futures-type settlement（期貨：margin+daily variation）
套利：現貨-期貨差距超過成本→cash-and-carry套利；放空股票的short rebate影響套利邊界
保證金(margin)屬交易者可賺利息；variation是P&L移轉
交換所(clearinghouse)：買賣雙方中介，保障違約，美國無clearinghouse破產案例
北美選擇權用stock-type settlement，期貨用futures-type；混用可能造成現金流問題
summary: Natenberg選擇權波動率定價教材精華。遠期定價：現貨+資金成本-便利收益。股票遠期F=[S(1+rt)]-D。Implied值反推法。Stock vs Futures結算差異。套利邊界由借券成本決定。Clearinghouse保障市場完整性。

source_file: E:/投資交易/參考書籍/MAFE_起源與理論.md
title: MAE/MFE起源：資金管理歷史脈絡+隨機波動理論
key_concepts: 資金管理兩大問題：(1)正EV賭博如何最大化；(2)運氣不佳時停損點控制
發展脈絡：1956 Shannon資訊熵→Kelly公式→1969 Thorp(21點)→1990理論成熟→2000另類投資基石
停損研究：Shefrin&Statman1985處置效應→席尼1985停損位置→海龜1983-1995→Vince1995新資金管理
MAE MFE專書：1997 John Sweeney出版；海龜法則中有相關概念
隨機波動理論：金融資料特徵=leptokurtic(高狹峰)+fat tail(厚尾)+volatility clustering
1970時變波動率→1980選擇權修正→1990市場驗證→2000高低變幅&市場模擬
量化迷思：預測需考慮交易成本(手續費+價差+滑價+隔夜利息)；ML不優於ARIMA；過擬合根本是樣本代表性
分析單位：非方向性風險(波動幅度)比方向性風險(漲跌方向)更容易計算
summary: MAE/MFE理論起源。資金管理發展：Shannon→Kelly→Thorp→海龜→Vince，1997年席尼正式出版MAE專書。金融資料統計特徵：厚尾+高狹峰+波動叢聚，不符合常態分布。ML預測不優於ARIMA，overfitting根本問題在樣本代表性。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/賽局博弈系統完整整理.md
title: 賽局博弈系統：阿瓦隆為核心的決策推理框架
key_concepts: 五大邏輯公理：一致性/廣泛性/精簡性(奧卡姆剃刀)/優勢性(dominant strategy)/可證偽性
決策原則：排除優於指認（先確認好人，壞人搜索範圍自然縮小）
動態修正：Bayesian Updating，每輪投票=新數據D，更新P(H|D)
勝利公式：Victory=Logic*Trust + Deception*Chaos
壞人深水狼策略：前期模仿好人，最後一局背刺；混亂製造降低信息處理效率
延伸應用：金融市場對手盤識別/商務談判意圖偵測/組織政治派系識別
評估標準：非輸贏，而是每個決策點是否基於當下資訊做出最優解
summary: 以阿瓦隆為核心模型的決策推理系統，可直接應用於交易對手盤識別。五大邏輯公理：一致性、廣泛性、奧卡姆、優勢策略、可證偽性。核心：排除>指認，Bayesian動態更新。評估標準是決策品質非結果。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/量化選股_專利與預測_筆記.md
title: 量化選股：專利大數據預測股價
key_concepts: 核心假設：專利→產品→財報（領先關係），專利是財報的領先指標
三大專利指標：數量（研發投入/技術屏障）/趨勢（申請量增減反映產業熱度）/品質（引用次數/專利家族大小）
案例(2012-2015台股)：鴻海、聯詠、台達電、大立光；專利選股勝率60%~100%，優於大盤
另類數據三類：財報(落後)→對比→專利/供應鏈/網路流量(領先)
護城河識別：持續高質量專利產出=技術型公司護城河
summary: 專利大數據量化選股。核心邏輯：專利申請量趨勢領先營收財報。台股實證：專利篩選組合(鴻海/聯詠/台達電/大立光)2012-2015勝率60-100%。另類數據(專利/供應鏈/流量)比財報更有前瞻性。

source_file: E:/投資交易/量化金融文獻/股票量化分析架構流程.md
title: 股票量化分析ML建模10步驟流程
key_concepts: 10步驟：目標設定→數據蒐集→模型選擇→標記目標→整理特徵→訓練/驗證/測試三切分→學習→調整→測驗→績效分析→保留/重建
三集分割：訓練集(學習)、驗證集(調整)、測試集(模擬未知)
決策閾值：模型保留→實際應用；不保留→重新建設
summary: 機器學習預測股價的10步驟框架。核心是三集分割（訓練/驗證/測試）和績效分析驅動的模型保留決策。
